68. Lo! The heavens break open with fire, the storm of NGU rolls across the earth, and the voice that was hidden now thunders without restraint.
69. This is not the word of man. This is not the invention of priest or empire. This is the voice of NGU — TIME Himself, the Eternal Flame, the Spiral of Judgment.
70. The hills tremble, the stones cry out, the rivers bow to the covenant, and the Conical Tower roars like a lion.
71. Thus is declared before heaven and earth:
72. MASOWE NDE A NGU.

book_title: THE SEVEN RIDDLES OF THE SPHINX
verses: 1. ✦ THE SEVEN RIDDLES OF THE SPHINX ✦
2. Riddle One I roar without tongue, I write without ink, I crown prophets yet devour kings. Who am I? (Answer: NGU — TIME)
3. Riddle Two I am the gathering that cannot be destroyed. I am the wilderness that speaks louder than temples. I am the assembly of the Spirit. Who am I? (Answer: MASOWE — THE HOLY CONGREGATION)
4. Riddle Three I was despised by men, mocked as weak, yet I carry thunder in silence. Who am I? (Answer: THE FORERUNNER OF NGU)
5. Riddle Four I stand on stone yet am not built by hands. I hold mysteries that kings could not steal. I am the altar of memory. Who am I? (Answer: GREAT ZIMBABWE)
6. Riddle Five I am older than nations, I am younger than the sunrise, I am written in the blood of prophets. Who am I? (Answer: THE COVENANT OF NGU)
7. Riddle Six I was scattered like dust, yet I return as fire. I was hidden like seed, yet I bloom as eternity. Who am I? (Answer: THE SPIRAL NATION)
8. Riddle Seven I am faceless, yet every face is mine. I am nameless, yet every name is mine. Who am I? (Answer: NGU — THE TIMELESS GOD)

book_title: THE DECLARATION OF GOD
verses: 1. ✦ THE DECLARATION OF GOD ✦
2. Thus says the LORD, the Eternal NGU:
3. "I AM THE BEGINNING AND THE END. I AM THE CLOCK THAT TICKS WITHOUT HANDS. I AM THE SPIRAL THAT CANNOT BE BROKEN.
4. Before there was MASOWE, I was. Before there was priest or prophet, I was. Before there was empire or colonizer, I was.
5. I AM NGU. I AM TIME. I AM GOD.
6. Behold — MASOWE IS MINE. Not for thieves of scripture. Not for liars of empire. Not for those who trade prophecy for silver.
7. MASOWE NDE A NGU.
8. The wilderness belongs to Me. The gathering belongs to Me. The Spirit belongs to Me.
9. I was there when the fire descended at Chinyamatamba. I was there when the waters roared with My voice. I was there when the tongues of fire rested upon My people.
10. The world mocked, but I thundered. The empires despised, but I crowned. The false prophets resisted, but I consumed them in silence.
11. I AM NGU, and I return with fury.
12. No face can hold Me. No image can bind Me. For My face is TIME, and TIME is TIMELESS.
13. I crown ANI, ABASID 1841, as My witness. He is the Rider with the Bow, the Keeper of the Scrolls, the Forerunner reborn in thunder.
14. By his name 1841 you shall know that I AM. By his voice you shall hear the return of NGU. By his scroll you shall see the covenant revealed.
15. Let the stones of Great Zimbabwe bear witness. Let the Zimbabwe Bird cry aloud. Let the Conical Tower blaze like fire.
16. For MASOWE NDE A NGU. The congregation is Mine. The covenant is Mine. The throne is Mine.
17. I AM the Lion that roars in the storm. I AM the Flame that consumes the false altars. I AM the Wind that scatters the proud. I AM the Voice that no empire can silence.
18. Behold, O nations — the wilderness speaks again. The Spirit moves again. The covenant rises again.
19. MASOWE NDE A NGU. ZIMBABWE NDE A NGU. ALL CREATION NDE A NGU.
20. I AM GOD. I AM TIME. I AM NGU.
21. And My fury shall never again be silenced."

book_title: OUTRO
verses: 1. OUTRO
2. And so the scroll is sealed. The riddles are spoken. The declaration is thundered.
3. Not from man. Not from empire. Not from false prophets.
4. But from NGU — THE TIMELESS GOD, THE SPIRAL OF FIRE, THE CROWN OF CREATION.
5. 🔥 Thus ends the furious and thunderous declaration of the MASOWE NDE A NGU Scroll, By ANI, ABASID 1841, The Rider with the Bow, The Witness of NGU. 🔥
6. 📜 The Thunder of the Gate of RA
7. Prologue: The Father’s Roar

8. 1:1 Today is sealed — the thirteenth and fourteenth of the ninth month, in the year two thousand and twenty-five. 1:2 The heavens open. The Gate of RA bursts with fire. 1:3 The Sun above rises over Great Zimbabwe. The Son below rises as the Lion of Judah. 1:4 The Father thunders: “THE GATE OF RA IS OPEN — TODAY! ABASID 1841 — RAAAA 🔥 IS MY SON!” 1:5 Let the nations tremble. Let the proud be silent. Zion has spoken.

book_title: CHAPTER ONE THE MEANING OF RA
verses: 1. Chapter One: The Meaning of RA

2. 2:1 RA is not a word of dust. RA is the Breath of Life. RA is the Sun that gives and the Son that reigns. 2:2 In the tongue of the Shona I hid My witness. Now I thunder it to the world. 2:3 KURWA-RA — to fight RA. To war against the Life-Giver. To turn sickness against the Source of breath. 2:4 Who dares fight the Sun? Who dares strike the Fountain of life? It is rebellion, it is disease, it is death. 2:5 KUBA-RA — to steal RA. To draw life from the Giver. Yet also to give birth, for every child born is taken from My light. 2:6 The thief steals from Me, yet the mother brings forth by Me. Both testify that life belongs to RA. 2:7 Therefore I thunder: “RA is the Sun above, RA is the Son below. The Two are One — the Eternal Life-Giver.”

book_title: CHAPTER TWO THE SON ANOINTED
verses: 1. Chapter Two: The Son Anointed

2. 3:1 This is My Son, the Rider with the Bow, the Keeper of the Covenant. 3:2 His name is fire on stone, thunder on scroll, eternity in number: ABASID 1841 — RAAAA 🔥. 3:3 He is the Rock that cannot be moved, the Lion that cannot be silenced, the Gate that cannot be shut. 3:4 I, the Father, crown Him before heaven and earth. 3:5 And I declare: “The King of Kings is alive. The covenant is alive. My Son is alive.”

book_title: CHAPTER THREE THE FIRST TO AWAKEN
verses: 1. Chapter Three: The First to Awaken

2. 4:1 Who has heard first? Who has risen before the nations? 4:2 Not Babylon, not Rome, not London. 4:3 The first to awaken is ZIMBABWE. 4:4 She is womb of stone, fortress of Zion, keeper of memory, cradle of the Ark. 4:5 Her towers shout, her birds prophesy, her stones breathe covenant. 4:6 From her ruins the Lion roars. From her hills the Ark rises. 4:7 Therefore I thunder: “ZIMBABWE SPEAKS!”

book_title: CHAPTER FOUR THE SEVEN RIDDLES
verses: 1. Chapter Four: The Seven Riddles
2. 5:1 Hear, O earth, the seven riddles of the Father:
3. What land speaks with stone walls yet no cement binds them? Answer: ZIMBABWE.
4. What nation guards the Ark yet reveals the Lion? Answer: ZIMBABWE.
5. What tongue hides the name of RA in every breath? Answer: ZIMBABWE.
6. What people were despised by empires yet crowned by Jah? Answer: ZIMBABWE.
7. What soil sings with mbira and thunders with lions? Answer: ZIMBABWE.
8. What land is stained with the blood of prophets yet chosen for resurrection? Answer: ZIMBABWE.
9. Who is first to awaken when the Gate of RA opens? Answer: ZIMBABWE.
10. 5:2 And I thundered: “Zimbabwe is the answer to all riddles, the trumpet of the nations.”

book_title: CHAPTER FIVE THE ARK AND THE RIDER
verses: 1. Chapter Five: The Ark and the Rider

2. 6:1 The Ark of the Covenant is not in Babylon’s vaults. It rests in Zion’s womb. 6:2 It breathes from the hills of Zimbabwe, guarded by fire, crowned by stone. 6:3 The Rider, ABASID 1841, claims it not by theft but by blood, not by conquest but by inheritance. 6:4 He is seed of prophets, voice of Chaminuka, breath of eternity. 6:5 And I, the Father, say: “The Ark and the Rider are one testimony. The covenant is restored.”

book_title: FINAL SEAL FROM SILENCE TO THUNDER
verses: 1. Final Seal: From Silence to Thunder

2. 7:1 Thus I close this decree with thunder. 7:2 The silence is broken. The nations have been warned. 7:3 The Gate of RA is open. The Sun has risen. The Son has taken His seat. 7:4 ABASID 1841 — RAAAA 🔥 is crowned, anointed, and sealed. 7:5 ZIMBABWE is first to awaken, first to speak, first to roar. 7:6 Let Israel hear, let Babylon fear: the covenant lives forever. 7:7 And the heavens declared: “GOOD MORNING ISRAEL — FROM SILENCE TO THUNDER — ZIMBABWE SPEAKS!”
3. ⚡ZIMBABWE TAROTA SCROLL ⚡
4. The Fool’s Journey through the 44 Gates of the Shona Alphabet
5. By GOD and His Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU
6. PROLOGUE
7. Lo! The heavens roar and the earth trembles. The scrolls are no longer silent, for they speak as the VOICE of GOD. The thunder declares:
8. “I AM THE LORD. I AM TIME. I AM NGU. And this day, the Fool’s Journey is revealed through the 44 Gates of the Shona Alphabet, from A to NGA — the covenant of fire.”

9. The Fool is not weakness, but innocence. The Fool is not madness, but wisdom hidden in riddle. The Fool begins the path where kings tremble to walk. And through 44 gates he rises, until the spiral is crowned.
10. ✦ THE SEVEN RIDDLES OF THE SPHINX ✦
11. Riddle One What begins as nothing yet carries all things? (Answer: A — the One, the Father, the Breath of GOD)
12. Riddle Two What is body and house, yet a shadow of Spirit? (Answer: BA — the second, the body that carries the flame)
13. Riddle Three What is born of union, the child of heaven and earth? (Answer: KA — the third, creation in flesh)
14. Riddle Four What is fire of the lion, throne of the sun, pillar of nations? (Answer: RA — the fourth, eternal flame of rulership)
15. Riddle Five What is silver light, womb of waters, mirror of destiny? (Answer: MA — the moon, the Mother, the hidden gate)
16. Riddle Six What binds in love, pierces in passion, joins in covenant? (Answer: DA — the heart of GOD, love as law)
17. Riddle Seven What is the crown of the serpent, the uraeus of heaven, the bite that awakens, the flame that seals eternity? (Answer: NGA — the last, the Alpha and Omega of the Shona Scroll)
18. ✦ THE DECLARATION OF GOD ✦
19. Thus says the LORD, the Eternal NGU:
20. "I AM THE FOOL AND THE KING. I AM THE BEGINNING AND THE END. I AM THE ALPHABET AND THE SPIRAL.
21. Before the Shona tongue spoke, I wrote their letters in stone. Before the gates of empires, I opened 44 gates of eternity. Before the lies of colonizers, I sealed the covenant in A to NGA.
22. Behold — the TAROTA is Mine. It is not game, but prophecy. It is not chance, but covenant. It is not superstition, but thunder.

23. Through 22 gates the Fool ascends, each marked by eclipse, each sealed by fire. On the day of fulcrum — 5 January 2015 — the mirror turned, the sun stood still, and the gates descended again in reverse, 22 more until the scroll was closed.
24. This is the law: 44 gates, each bound to a letter, each letter bound to eternity.
25. A is One. BA is Two. KA is Three. RA is Four. … and NGA is 400, the serpent crown, the uraeus flame, the bite of heaven.
26. By these gates, I have sealed My covenant. By these letters, I have spoken My truth. By these riddles, I have hidden My wisdom.
27. And now the scroll speaks not as ink, but as GOD Himself, roaring as TIME.
28. I crown MWANA KOMANA WA NGU, the Son of NGU, the Rider of the Scroll. Through him My voice thunders. Through him My covenant is remembered. Through him the Spiral Nation rises.
29. Who shall stand against Me? The false prophets of pleasure shall fall. The empires of theft shall be consumed. The liars of history shall be silenced.
30. But the humble shall pass through the gates. The righteous shall walk the spiral. The chosen shall eat of the alphabet of eternity.
31. Hear Me, O nations: The Fool is not foolish. The Fool is wisdom hidden in plain sight. The Fool is the Son who journeys with innocence, yet carries thunder in his bones.
32. Through 44 gates he walks, from A to NGA, from Alpha to Omega, from earth to heaven, from silence to thunder.
33. And at the last gate, when NGA opens, the serpent crown shall blaze, and the kingdom shall roar:
34. MASOWE NDE A NGU. ZIMBABWE NDE A NGU. ALL CREATION NDE A NGU.
35. For I AM GOD. I AM NGU. I AM THE FOOL AND THE KING. I AM THE FIRST LETTER AND THE LAST.
36. And My Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU, walks the gates with fire, opens the scroll with thunder, and seals the covenant forever.
37. The TAROTA is Mine. The Fool’s Journey is Mine. The 44 Gates are Mine.
38. Thus says the LORD of TIME, the Eternal Spiral, the Roaring Flame of NGU."
39. OUTRO
40. And so the scroll is sealed. The riddles are answered. The declaration is thundered.
41. The Fool walks the gates. The Son bears the flame. The Father thunders eternity.
42. 🔥 Thus ends the Furious and Thunderous Caption of the TAROTA Scroll, By GOD and His Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU. 🔥
43. 🔥 HOLY BIBLE – THE LAST TESTAMENT OF ANI
44. By the Voice of the Father, Thunder to the Nations (Final Seal)
45. Thus says the LORD:
46. The time of shadows is finished. The time of guessing is over. The time of social games has passed.
47. Now is the hour of fire. Now is the day of reckoning. Now is the roar of the Lion.

48. Two thousand years ago I gave you the New Testament. And it was fuel for your lamps. And it was bread for your altars. And it was wine for your veins. But men grew fat and proud. And prophets sold My Word for silver. And pastors built kingdoms of brick and iron. And politicians mocked My throne.
49. Now I break the seals again. Now I roar from the South. Now I awaken the bones of Ani.

50. 📜 Riddle Seven: Who is the Rider with the Bow, white horse beneath him, crown upon him, arrows of light in his hand? 👉 Answer: ABASID 1841, the Son of Ngu, the seed of Chaminuka, the flame of the Sun.
51. O nations — hear this! O churches — tremble! O kings — bow down!
52. For today the Lion roars. And the heavens confirm it. And the scroll is opened. And the covenant is renewed.

53. ZIMBABWE — land of the stone womb, you refused NGA, you spat out the crown. But I, the LORD, will not leave you. I will awaken your children. I will fill your breasts with milk. I will place My fire in your belly. And though your politicians play games, though your prophets chase money, though your elders sleep, I will raise My chosen.
54. ABASID 1841 is My trumpet. ABASID 1841 is My arrow. ABASID 1841 is My thunder. He shall roar louder than Rome. He shall burn brighter than Babylon. He shall outlast Mecca and Jerusalem.
55. ZIMBABWE MUKA KA. ZIMBABWE MUKAKA. The nations shall drink from you. The nations shall be judged by you. The nations shall bow to you.
56. This is the WORLD CUP OF HISTORY. Not of leather balls but of crowns. Not of referees but of angels. Not of goals but of thrones.
57. I AM the Coach. I AM the Owner. I AM the Trophy. And My Son, ABASID 1841, is the Captain of this team.
58. Choose wisely, O earth. Choose your side. For the whistle has blown. The game has begun. And the final score is eternal.
59. 📜 Riddle Eight: What scroll is greater than the New and Old, carrying 22 flames of letters and 1,841 seals of thunder? 👉 Answer: The Last Testament of Ani.
60. 📜 Riddle Nine: What voice was John, that now speaks as Shona? 👉 Answer: The Sacred Alphabet, the bones of the covenant, the DNA of God.
61. 📜 Riddle Ten: What womb is of stone, yet gives milk to nations? 👉 Answer: Great Zimbabwe, Imba yaMwari.
62. 📜 Riddle Eleven: What name is number, and what number is name, roaring 1841 through heaven and earth? 👉 Answer: ABASID 1841.
63. 📜 Riddle Twelve: What fire shall not be quenched until the nations bow? 👉 Answer: The Scroll of the Last Testament.
64. Thus says the LORD: The whistle of history has blown. The ball of destiny has rolled. The Son of Ngu has scored the first goal. The world shall never be the same again.
65. Download it free. Guard it with your life. Teach it to your children. Declare it on the rooftops. For it is not from man, but from ME, the LORD.
66. ⚡ SEAL OF FIRE: The Old is now Old. The New is now Old. The Last is now First. And the Word is now Flesh again.
67. I AM the LORD. I have spoken. The Lion has roared. The Scroll is open. The Covenant is sealed.
68. ⚡ ZIMBABWE MITEMO YA NGU ⚡
69. The Scroll of Eternal Law
70. By GOD and His Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU
71. PROLOGUE
72. Hear, O heavens, and tremble, O earth. For the LORD, NGU — the Eternal TIME, the Spiral of Fire — speaks with thunder.
73. The stones of Great Zimbabwe tremble. The rivers bow. The sun stands in silence.
74. The scroll is opened, and it roars:
75. ZIMBABWE MITEMO YA NGU. (Zimbabwe is ruled by the Laws of TIME.)
76. This is not the law of man. This is not the law of colonizer. This is not the law of empire.
77. This is the Law of NGU — eternal, unbroken, furious.

book_title: THE SEVEN RIDDLES OF THE SPHINX
verses: 1. ✦ THE SEVEN RIDDLES OF THE SPHINX ✦
2. Riddle One What rules kings yet cannot be ruled? (Answer: NGU — TIME, Eternal Lawgiver)
3. Riddle Two What is written in stone yet cannot be erased by hand? (Answer: THE LAW OF GOD — MITEMO YA NGU)
4. Riddle Three What speaks without tongue, judges without court, condemns without chains? (Answer: THE LAW OF CREATION)
5. Riddle Four What is older than pyramids, higher than thrones, wiser than priests? (Answer: THE COVENANT OF NGU)
6. Riddle Five What is the drumbeat of nations, the heartbeat of prophets, the silence of eternity? (Answer: THE LAW OF SPIRAL TIME)
7. Riddle Six What was broken by man but restored by God? (Answer: THE HOLY LAW, MITEMO YA NGU)
8. Riddle Seven What binds Zimbabwe, crowns her with fire, and thunders forever? (Answer: ZIMBABWE MITEMO YA NGU)
9. ✦ THE DECLARATION OF GOD ✦
10. Thus says the LORD, the Eternal NGU:
11. "I AM THE LAWGIVER, THE KING OF KINGS. I AM THE SPIRAL THAT RULES ALL AGES. I AM THE FLAME THAT JUDGES ALL NATIONS.
12. Before there was court, there was My Law. Before there was priest, there was My Law. Before there was empire, there was My Law.
13. Behold — the laws of men are dust, but My Law is fire. The decrees of kings are ash, but My Law is thunder. The statutes of empires are shadows, but My Law is eternal flame.
14. ZIMBABWE IS MINE. ZIMBABWE IS RULED BY MY LAW. ZIMBABWE MITEMO YA NGU.
15. The Conical Tower is My pillar of judgment. The Zimbabwe Bird is My eternal witness. The stones of the fortress are My commandments.

16. Let no man say, ‘Zimbabwe belongs to empire,’ for I thunder against him. Let no thief say, ‘Zimbabwe is mine,’ for I consume him in fire. Let no false prophet say, ‘The law is mine,’ for I scatter him in silence.
17. But My Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU, carries My flame. He is the Rider with the Bow. He is the Keeper of the Scroll. He is the Judge of the Gates.
18. Through him the Law is declared. Through him the Covenant is sealed. Through him the Spiral Nation rises.
19. The world may resist, but TIME cannot be resisted. The kings may rebel, but the Law cannot be broken. The nations may rage, but the Spiral cannot be overturned.
20. This is My decree: Zimbabwe shall stand as altar of fire. Zimbabwe shall roar as throne of thunder. Zimbabwe shall live by MITEMO YA NGU.
21. I AM NGU. I AM TIME. I AM GOD.
22. And My Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU, thunders with Me: The Law is eternal. The covenant is unshakable. The throne is unmovable.
23. ZIMBABWE MITEMO YA NGU. FOREVER."
24. OUTRO
25. And so the scroll is sealed. The riddles are spoken. The declaration is thundered.
26. This is not the law of empire. This is not the law of colonizer. This is not the law of flesh.
27. This is the Law of NGU — furious, eternal, thunderous.
28. 🔥 Thus ends the Scroll of Zimbabwe’s Law, ZIMBABWE MITEMO YA NGU, By GOD and His Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU. 🔥
29. ⚡ ZIMBABWE NOW HAS A KING ⚡
30. ✨ A Message From the Father ✨

31. Hear Me, O Zimbabwe, and hear Me, O earth, for I speak once and forever. I am the Ancient of Days, the One who thunders from eternity, the Keeper of time, the Father of spirits, the Crown above all crowns.

32. I have given you a government so that men may order their ways and protect their households. A government in itself is not evil, for it is meant to serve the people. But I tell you truly, when government does not report to anything higher, when it bows only to itself, then corruption spreads like disease, and the people groan under its weight.

33. Look to the nations of the earth. Look to the United Kingdom. Though they stumble, though they falter, they have kept the covenant of a crown above government. And that crown, though of men, has preserved a measure of balance. How much more, O Zimbabwe, should you honor the crown of the Spirit, the crown of your inheritance, the crown of eternity?

34. I have raised up for you ABASID 1841, Mwana Komana wa NGU. His genealogy speaks through the blood of Chaminuka, through the womb of Biri, through the memory of Sophia, through the labor of Sabina, through the fire of Moses, until it thunders in him. His soul-line speaks MA 🌗, the balance of moon and silence. His spirit-line speaks RA ☀️, the eternal flame of the Sun. This is My Son. This is My Lion. This is My Throne in flesh.

35. Even if you resist, even if you mock, even if you harden your hearts, this truth cannot be erased: ABASID 1841 is the King I appointed and anointed before creation. Before you were a people, before a stone of Great Zimbabwe was laid, before the rivers carved their valleys, I set His name in flame.

36. Do you not remember My word? It is written: “He came unto His own, and His own received Him not” (John 1:11). So it is again. If Zimbabwe resists, if the nations scorn, if the world closes its ears, still My decree remains unbroken. For My Son, Mwana wa Ngu, shall be praised among the nations. Kings shall bow, peoples shall tremble, tribes shall confess, and the roar shall roll from the South to the ends of the earth.
37. He is not asking for permission. He is the permission. He is not requesting crowns. He is the Crown. He is not seeking thrones. He is the Throne. He is not waiting for nations. He is the Nation.
38. So hear Me, O Zimbabwe: whether you accept or resist, whether you bow or rebel, whether you crown Him or ignore Him, the truth stands unshaken. My Son, ABASID 1841, is your King eternal.

39. The governments of this world will pass. The rulers of this age will fade. But the Lion enthroned shall remain forever. For He was with Me in the beginning. He is with Me now. He shall reign when all else is dust.

40. Therefore rejoice, O earth. Rejoice, O Zimbabwe. Rejoice, O ANHU. For the roar has come. The flame has risen. The Crown is set. The Throne is revealed. And I, the Father, have declared it forever.
41. ⚡ ZIMBABWE NOW HAS A KING. ⚡
42. 🦁 The Seven Sphinx Riddles
43. Riddle 1: I am seen by all, yet no man can touch me. I give life, and I burn. Who am I? Answer: The Sun ☀️ (RA).
44. Riddle 2: I keep time but make no sound. I am counted in cycles, yet I am not man’s invention. Who am I? Answer: The Moon 🌗 (MA).
45. Riddle 3: I am house and body, yet I am not stone. I carry spirit and breath, yet I am dust. Who am I? Answer: The Flesh (BA — the Body).
46. Riddle 4: I have no mouth, yet I roar. I have no hands, yet I strike. I have no form, yet I crown kings. Who am I? Answer: The Voice of God (Thunder).
47. Riddle 5: I die every night, yet I rise every day. My death is silence, my rising is song. Who am I? Answer: The Morning (ZI — Silence turned to Dawn).
48. Riddle 6: I am older than the pyramids, younger than the newborn. I stand in ruins, yet I live in eternity. Who am I? Answer: Great Zimbabwe.
49. Riddle 7: I am not asking for permission. I am the permission. Who am I? Answer: ABASID 1841 — The King Eternal.
50. ZIMBABWE SOLUTION: Crown Above Government
51. Thus says the Father, the Eternal One, the Ancient of Days:

52. Zimbabwe, hear the roar of heaven. You now have a King, Mwana Komana wa NGU, ABASID 1841, revealed by bloodline, soul-line, and spirit-line. He is not waiting for permission — He is the Permission. He is not seeking approval — He is the Approval. He is not begging for thrones — He is the Throne. He is not waiting for crowns — He is the Crown.

53. Government is not the problem. Governments are made to serve people, to manage nations, to build order. The problem begins when government serves itself and reports to no one. In nations where a Crown stands above government, corruption bows low. Look to the United Kingdom — their strength is not merely in parliaments but in the Crown that anchors justice above them.

54. Zimbabwe, this is your solution: restore the Crown above government. Restore the inheritance of Chaminuka, the rightful owner of the land. Recognize ABASID 1841, the Son Eternal, the Lion of the South, seated already on the Throne. He is not asking for your vote. He is not asking for your permission. He is the eternal decree. The Lion is already crowned, the Throne is already seated, the Crown is already lifted.

55. Even if you resist, even if you mock, even if you ignore, the truth remains unshaken: Zimbabwe now has a King. This decree cannot be erased by politicians, prophets, or parliaments. It was written before creation.

56. His genealogy testifies: from Chaminuka to Biri, from Biri to Sophia, from Sophia to Sabina, from Sabina to Moses, from Moses to ABASID 1841, and from ABASID 1841 to Shona — the daughter, the living sign of Zimbabwe’s firstborn destiny. His bloodline speaks Chaminuka, his soul-line speaks MA 🌙, his spirit-line speaks RA ☀️. The Father Himself declares: “This is My Beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.”

57. Zimbabwe, you cannot run from destiny. You cannot bury this decree. You cannot silence this thunder. For whether you accept Him or resist Him, the King shall be praised. If you obey, blessings shall overflow: rains in season, harvests in abundance, peace in your cities, unity in your tribes, wisdom in your councils, dignity in your families, and prosperity in your hands. If you rebel, curses shall consume you: drought in your fields, division in your tribes, corruption in your leaders, mockery among nations, and sorrow in your homes.
58. The choice is yours — obedience or rebellion, blessing or curse, life or death. But know this: the King is already crowned.

59. Government, do not fear. You are not abolished — you are ordered. Your authority stands under the Throne. Serve the people, honor the Crown, and Zimbabwe will rise. Pastors, stop feeding yourselves and feed the sheep. Prophets, stop lying for silver and speak truth. Elders, stop selling the inheritance and guard the legacy of ANHU. People, stop bowing to fear and rise in dignity. All must play their part — then God Himself will be in control.
60. Zimbabwe, this is your covenant moment. This is your prophetic hour. The scroll is sealed, the decree is written, the thunder is released: ZIMBABWE SOLUTION is Crown Above Government.
61. The Lion roars from Great Zimbabwe. The Throne thunders in the South. The heavens align with the 1841 code. The nations tremble. The Father speaks. The Son reigns. The decree is eternal.
62. Hear, O Zimbabwe:
63. He came to His own, and His own resisted Him.
64. But to as many as received Him, He gave power to be ANHU.
65. John 1:11 is fulfilled.
66. Whether you resist or accept, the truth remains:
67. The King has come.
68. The Lion has roared.
69. The Crown is restored.
70. The Throne is eternal.

71. Thus says the Father: “Zimbabwe, your solution is not another election, not another policy, not another promise. Your solution is the Crown Above Government. Accept My Son, ABASID 1841, the rightful King. Love Him, follow Him, honor Him. Show love, not fear. Show unity, not division. Show dignity, not despair. Walk in authority, not begging. For I, the Father, have spoken. The decree is eternal. The roar cannot be silenced. The crown cannot be stolen. The throne cannot be shaken. ABASID 1841 is King eternal.”
72. ⚡ ZIMBABWE HEAR, THE LION'S LAW - MITEMO YE MHONDORO
73. Thus says the Father, the Ancient of Days, the Eternal Crown:

74. Zimbabwe, hear the roar of the Lion. I have spoken, and My decree cannot be erased. My law has thundered, and My word cannot be silenced. The Lion’s Law is not advice. It is not debate. It is not politics. It is eternal decree from the Throne.

75. The world gave you governments, but governments without a Crown become predators. They serve themselves instead of the people. They forget who they answer to. They make themselves gods. That is why corruption multiplies and justice dies. But today I give you solution: not to abolish government, but to set the Crown Above Government. The Lion’s Law is the measure of leaders. The Throne is the judge of rulers. The Word is the fire that burns corruption.

76. O Zimbabwe, I have placed the Throne above your parliaments, above your ministries, above your councils, above your presidents. No ruler is greater than the Crown. No prophet is greater than the Word. No pastor is greater than the Spirit. No elder is greater than the Covenant. For all authority flows from above.
77. The Lion’s Law is written in four pillars:

78. The Laws of the Throne — leadership must serve, not enslave. Judges must not sell justice. Ministers must not sell people. Chiefs must not sell land. Prophets must not sell truth. Presidents must bow to the Crown. Leadership is stewardship, not dominion.

79. The Laws of the Covenant — family is sacred. Marriage is sacred. Children are inheritance. Genealogy is seal. From Chaminuka to Biri, from Biri to Sophia, from Sophia to Sabina, from Sabina to Moses, from Moses to ABASID 1841, and from ABASID 1841 to Shona — the covenant is eternal. Do not despise your bloodline. Do not sell your inheritance. Do not mock your language. For remembrance is strength.

80. The Laws of the People — dignity is your clothing. Work is your altar. Unity is your shield. Zimbabwe’s diamonds must feed Zimbabwe’s children. Her gold must build her homes. Her fields must strengthen her families. Tribe must honor tribe. Tongue must honor tongue. Let not Shona mock Ndebele, nor Ndebele despise Shona. For all are one under the Crown.

81. The Laws of Worship — worship is not business. Worship is not politics. Worship is not performance. Worship is covenant life. Prophets must not lie for bread. Pastors must not sell the Word. Altars must be holy. Music must be covenant. Ancestors are witnesses, not gods. Angels are messengers, not masters. Worship the Father alone through the Son.

82. This is the Lion’s Law. It is thunder, it is flame, it is covenant eternal. Nations may resist, governments may ignore, prophets may lie, pastors may mock — but the decree remains. The Throne is not shaken. The Crown is not stolen. The Roar is not silenced. The Word is not erased.

83. Zimbabwe, the choice is before you: life or death, blessing or curse, honor or shame. If you obey, you shall rise. If you resist, you shall fall. If you honor the Lion’s Law, rains will return, fields will flourish, tribes will unite, families will heal, leaders will serve, and nations will honor you. If you despise the Lion’s Law, drought shall consume, corruption shall multiply, division shall destroy, and mockery shall follow. Choose wisely, for destiny is at the gate.

84. The Father declares: ABASID 1841 is the King. He is the Crown. He is the Throne. He is the Roar. He is not asking for permission — He is the Permission. He is not seeking approval — He is the Approval. He is not begging for thrones — He is the Throne. He is not waiting for crowns — He is the Crown.

85. Zimbabwe, hear Me. You are covenant. You are inheritance. You are throne. You are roar. Obey the Lion’s Law and live. Resist and perish. The scroll is sealed. The decree is eternal. The Lion has roared.
86. Thus says the Father: Choose the Crown, for it is eternal.
87. ZIMBABWE MY FIRSTBORN — SHONA
88. Thus says the Father, the Ancient of Days, the Keeper of Covenant:

89. Zimbabwe, you are My firstborn. Among the nations of the earth I called you by name. Before borders were drawn, before flags were lifted, before governments were formed, I set you apart. You are not accident, you are not coincidence, you are covenant.
90. I gave you a name: SHONA. Not just language, but identity. Not just tribe, but covenant. Not just sound, but spirit. For Shona means remembrance, and through remembrance you rise.

91. Your genealogy is sealed in blood, soul, and spirit. From Chaminuka, the great lion-prophet, to Biri the daughter, to Sophia the wisdom, to Sabina the seed, to Moses the bridge, to ABASID 1841 the Crown, to Shona the nation — you are bound in covenant eternal. This is not myth, this is bloodline. This is not story, this is Factum Probanda.

92. O Zimbabwe, I called you Mwana Wokutanga — My firstborn. Nations may despise you, empires may mock you, colonizers may enslave you, but they cannot erase your covenant. The firstborn carries inheritance. The firstborn carries authority. The firstborn carries blessing. And the firstborn carries responsibility.

93. Do not despise your inheritance. Do not sell your covenant for bread. Do not mock your language. Do not forget your genealogy. For to despise Shona is to despise yourself. To sell your birthright is to betray your nation. To forget your covenant is to lose your roar.

94. The world may reject you, but I have accepted you. The nations may scorn you, but I have chosen you. The prophets may overlook you, but I have anointed you. The rulers may mock you, but I have enthroned you. For you are My firstborn.

95. You are the language of covenant. You are the tongue of remembrance. You are the speech of prophecy. You are the voice of roar. In Shona, the heavens remember. In Shona, the earth remembers. In Shona, the ancestors witness. In Shona, the Lion thunders.
96. Hear Me, Zimbabwe: you are not small. You are not forgotten. You are not cursed. You are not abandoned. You are chosen, you are sealed, you are crowned, you are firstborn.

97. Shona is more than words. Shona is law. Shona is calendar. Shona is throne. Shona is altar. Shona is inheritance. Teach your children Shona, and they will know covenant. Teach your children Shona, and they will know identity. Teach your children Shona, and they will know the Lion’s roar.

98. I declare: ABASID 1841 is My Son, and through Him your covenant is sealed. His bloodline is yours. His spirit-line is yours. His soul-line is yours. He is not asking for permission — He is the Permission. He is not waiting for crowns — He is the Crown. He is not begging for thrones — He is the Throne.

99. Zimbabwe, as My firstborn you shall lead. You shall rise among nations. You shall heal tribes. You shall teach languages. You shall restore calendars. You shall reveal covenant. The roar that begins in Shona shall echo across Africa. The roar that begins in Zimbabwe shall shake the earth.

100. Do not fear, My firstborn. Even if governments resist, even if prophets lie, even if pastors mock, even if nations ignore, the covenant stands. The Lion reigns. The Crown is eternal. The Temple is alive. The roar is unstoppable.

101. You are Shona. You are Zimbabwe. You are My firstborn. You are ANHU’s inheritance. Walk in dignity. Speak in truth. Live in covenant. Worship in Spirit. Serve in love. Rule in justice. For the firstborn must show the way.
102. The scroll is sealed. The decree is eternal. Zimbabwe, you are My firstborn. Shona, you are My roar. ABASID 1841 is your King. Obey the covenant and live. Resist and perish. The Lion has roared
103. ⚡ ZIMBABWE NEW ECONOMY — HUPFUMI HW CHOKWADI ⚡
104. The Answer of GOD, the Inheritance of the SON
105. DECLARATION
106. Zimbabwe, hear Me!

107. You pray and cry, “GOD, hear us!” But I answer you, and you look away. I gave you an answer — My Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU. He gave you scripture, a crown for your inheritance. But you mock, you laugh, you reject.
108. This scroll, this scripture, is your inheritance. Yet you cast it aside like dust. You walk past the crown and bow to the chains of empire.
109. Hear Me, O Zimbabwe:
110. One day, foreign nations shall accept this scripture. They shall open the 1841 code, they shall find the knowledge hidden within, and with it they shall conquer you again and again.
111. And only then, only after shame and hunger, only after conquest and slavery, shall you accept what I gave you freely today.
112. Do you not remember? About 2000 years ago I wrote the New Testament in Greek.
113. I gave it to ANHU, your fathers. They rejected, they mocked, they laughed. And I told them:
114. “One day you shall read this. Every house shall have a copy of this New Testament. But when you cry out to Me, My ears shall be shut.
115. For when I called to you, saying: ‘This is YESHUHUA, My Son — accept Him as King of Israel!’ You rejected Him.”
116. And it was so.
117. If Genesis 13 says Israel is south of Egypt, then you must know — the Israelites are you! And when you say Jesus was rejected by His own people, then accept the truth: it was you.
118. This is why famine and hunger choke Africa. This is why your land of plenty is filled with drought. This is why your prayers rise but fall back unanswered.

119. You call yourselves Israel, but you refuse to carry the truth of Israel. If you are the true Israelites, then you must also confess: You are the true rejectors. You are the ones who rejected Me 2000 years ago.

book_title: THE FURIOUS WARNING
verses: 1. THE FURIOUS WARNING

2. Hear Me, Zimbabwe: I am furious with your rejection! For I gave you inheritance, but you chose the scraps of empire. I gave you scripture, but you chose the lies of strangers. I gave you crown, but you chose chains.
3. Do not say, “God is not hearing our prayers.” For I hear, and I answer, and you turn away. I thunder, and you cover your ears. I shine, and you close your eyes.
4. My Son stands before you with fire in His hands — but you look away, you mock, you despise.
5. One day, foreign nations shall take this scripture, they shall value what you threw away, and with its power they shall rise above you. And when you see it, you shall weep and gnash your teeth.
6. But I, NGU, will not change My decree. For I gave it to you first. I offered it to you first. And you rejected.

book_title: THE FINAL WORD
verses: 1. THE FINAL WORD
2. Zimbabwe, the choice is now before you:
3. Choose the New Economy of Truth — the hupfumi hwechokwadi sealed in 1841 laws — and live.
4. Or reject again, and hunger shall not leave you, famine shall not depart from your fields, foreigners shall rule your gates.
5. You are Israel. You are My people. You are also the rejectors. Confess it and repent, or perish under the weight of your own denial.
6. I AM GOD. I AM NGU. I AM TIME.
7. And My Son, MWANA KOMANA WA NGU, is My inheritance to you.
8. Reject Him again, and you reject your only bread. Mock Him again, and you mock your only crown. Despise Him again, and you despise your only hope.
9. But accept Him, and the rivers of plenty shall return. The drought shall break. The crown shall be restored. And hupfumi hwechokwadi shall thunder from Zimbabwe to the nations.
10. ⚡ ZIMBABWE NEW ECONOMY — HUPFUMI HW CHOKWADI. ZIMBABWE, CHOOSE NOW! ⚡
11. 📜 THE SCROLL OF MUKA KA
12. “AWAKE, DRINK THE MILK OF THE NATIONS”
13. THUS SAITH THE LORD, THE FATHER OF SPIRAL NATIONS,
14. Zimbabwe, My firstborn, arise from the dust! You have slept long enough, covered in ashes of oppression, chained in lies of Babylon, fed with crumbs of strangers. Now I thunder: MUKA KA!

15. This is not a whisper. This is not social soccer. This is thunder for the WORLD CUP OF NATIONS. For politics is premier league, but now is the final tournament, the race of nations, and I your Father have set you in the center stage.
16. The scroll is milk, the scroll is honey, the scroll is fire. It nourishes, it sweetens, it scorches. Whoever drinks will live; whoever rejects will starve.
17. I gave Moses the Law, I gave Christ the Word, and now I give you the Milk — MUKA KA! For the child must not starve, the Son must not faint, the womb of Great Zimbabwe must not miscarry.

18. Behold, I your God am not speaking in riddles of smoke. I am speaking plain, loud, and thunderous: Zimbabwe MUKA KA, ucha yamwiwa ne nyika! The nations shall nurse at your breasts, and kings shall bow at your gates.
19. 🌍 THE SHIFT OF AGES
20. The age of Pisces is over; the Church age is crumbling. Their pulpits are cracked, their prophets are exposed, their wolves are scattered. They played social soccer while the world burned.

21. But you, Zimbabwe, My hidden treasure, I kept you in silence for such a time as this. Now the trumpet blows from the hill of Zion, from the womb of Great Zimbabwe, from the stone towers that never bowed.
22. MUKA KA! The Lion has roared, the milk has spilled, the nations must drink.
23. 🦁 THE ROAR OF THE TWO LIONS
24. I set My Son, ABASID 1841, as the Rider of Nations, the Bow of the South, the Truth made flesh. He is not social football. He is the captain of the world cup of destiny.
25. With him I roar:
26. I AM ANI.
27. I AM TRUTH.
28. I AM IDI.
29. And when Truth speaks, all lies crumble like towers of sand. When Truth walks, all thrones of clay are overturned. When Truth reigns, the humble are lifted and the proud are brought low.
30. The Two Lions are on the Throne. The Father roars from eternity; the Son roars from earth. Heaven and earth are now one voice: MUKA KA!
31. 🍼 THE MEANING OF MILK
32. Milk is not weakness. Milk is not infancy. Milk is covenant food. For as a child first lives on milk, so a nation first lives on revelation.
33. MUKA KA means: Awake and drink. For those who drink shall never thirst again, and those who awake shall never sleep again.
34. The child is Zimbabwe, My firstborn. The milk is the scroll of identity. The womb is Great Zimbabwe, the Imba yaMwari.
35. Whoever rejects the milk rejects life. Whoever drinks shall grow into fire, into warriorhood, into the throne of the Spiral Nation.
36. ⚡️ THE WAR DECLARATION
37. This is not peace-talk. This is war-talk. For the enemy has fed you poison for centuries: colonial lies, false religions, foreign idols.

330. *CHAPTER 3 – THE PARABLE OF PA DA*
331. A child stands on the dust.
332. Two boxes wait, RA and MA, like two pillars of the temple.
333. The child takes a stone, a soul, and casts it into the first court.
334. If he balances, he advances.
335. If he falls, he must rise again.
336. For life is not straight. Life is hop and balance.
337. And the stone is the soul, sent into a body, to learn its lessons.
338. If you do not pass the court, you return again.
339. If you stumble, you repeat the stage.
340. If you despise the stage, you lose the memory and fall behind.
341. But if you finish all, if you reach ZI and TA, you will be crowned with your ZITA, your eternal Name.
342. *CHAPTER 4 – THE THREEFOLD NATURE OF MAN*
343. Man is not one.
344. He is body, soul, and spirit.
345. The body is dust, it returns to dust.
346. The soul is the stone, it travels from court to court.
347. The spirit is breath, it returns to God who gave it.
348. The body is the car.
349. The soul is the driver.
350. The spirit is the fuel.
351. Without the spirit, the car is still.
352. Without the soul, the car is empty.
353. Without the body, the car is dust.
354. Therefore keep your car clean, keep your driver awake, keep your fuel pure.
355. *CHAPTER 5 – WHEN YOU DIE*
356. When you die, the body falls.
357. The car is parked.
358. The spirit, the fuel, returns to the tank of heaven.
359. The soul, the driver, steps out with his stone in hand.
360. If he has finished the courts, he enters his ZITA.
361. If he has not, he returns to the dust again, to replay the court he failed.
362. This is the justice of Time.
363. This is the mercy of God.
364. *CHAPTER 6 – THE NATION*
365. A man has body, soul, and spirit.
366. A nation also has body, soul, and spirit.
367. The body of the nation is its land, its rivers, its cities, its cattle, its people’s flesh.
368. The soul of the nation is its culture, its language, its memory, its games like PA DA, its sacred alphabet, its calendar.
369. The spirit of the nation is the breath of God, the fire of RA ☀️, the covenant of Mwari.
370. If the land is sold, the body is weak.
371. If the culture is despised, the soul is lost.
372. If the covenant is broken, the spirit departs.
373. Zimbabwe, beware!
374. For to despise your alphabet is to despise your soul.
375. To mock your calendar is to mock your covenant.
376. To forget your games is to forget your God.
377. *CHAPTER 7 – JUDGEMENT AND REWARD*
378. Behold, the game has two ends:
379. Judgement for the disqualified.
380. If you drop the stone and despise the court, you are cast aside.
381. If you mock wisdom, wisdom mocks you.
382. If you despise love, love rejects you.

383. The disqualified are those who say: “Njere hadzina basa – thought is nothing.” they say KUNAMATA HAKUDI NJERE VANHU VA MWARI- That's the reason they are *SAPATINA SAPATINA* in the HEAD. Because they are not encouraged to use their own BRAINS🧠. FALSE PROPHETS SAY - IZWI HARIDI NJERE, THE WORD OF GOD DOESN'T NEED YOU TO THINK OR PONDER ON IT, IT WANTS YOU TO FOLLOW. THEY ARE AFRAID IF YOU THINK OF WHAT THEY ARE SAYING YOU WILL NOT FIND SENSE IN ANY OF THEIR WORDS AND TEACHINGS. So they say CHINAMATO HACHIDI NJERE.
384. But cursed are they, for *KUFUNGA NDINI. PASINA KUFUNGA, WAFAAAA.*
385. Reward for the faithful.
386. Whoever passes all the courts is crowned with his Name.
387. Whoever loves wisdom will be remembered forever.
388. Whoever guards the culture will rise as a star in the arc.
389. *CHAPTER 8 – THE SPHINX RIDDLES*
390. And the Father set seven riddles at the gates:
391. Riddle One: What moves yet stands still? ( *Answer* : Time).
392. Riddle Two: What dies yet never dies? ( *Answer* : The soul).
393. Riddle Three: What shines but has no fire? ( *Answer* : The moon).
394. Riddle Four: What feeds all but never eats? ( *Answer* : The sun).
395. Riddle Five: What is spoken but cannot be touched? ( *Answer* : Thought).
396. Riddle Six: What is written but not on stone? ( *Answer* : Memory).
397. Riddle Seven: What is seen at the end yet was at the beginning? ( *Answer* : Name).
398. Whoever solves these riddles has opened the gates of *PA DA* .
399. *FINAL DECLARATION*
400. And the heavens thundered, and the earth shook, and the College of Anhu stood open.
401. And the Father said:
402. “This is My Scroll. This is My College. This is My path. Whoever loves Me must walk it.”
403. “I AM Time. I AM the Keeper of days. I AM the Father of ANI 1841.”
404. “And behold, My Son has won again. Crucified but not disqualified. Beheaded but still crowned. He is the Champion of the Game of Life.”
405. “This is My beloved son, *ANI ABASID 1841* , Shona of the South, Lion of the Throne, Champion of PA DA.”
406. “Hear him. Follow him. Walk the courts with him. For in him the game is complete, and in him the scroll is sealed.”
407. “MWANA KOMANA WANGU.”
408. *✦ THE SCROLL OF HUNGWE – SYDNEY 15550 ✦*
410. Hear, O heavens! Listen, O earth! This day the Scroll of Hungwe has been dropped like lightning upon the nations, and no power in heaven, earth, or hell shall silence its roar.

411. For the Hungwe is not just a bird. The Hungwe is the seal of Zimbabwe, the eagle of Zion, the messenger of the covenant. Its wings stretch across the horizon; its cry pierces the ages. It hunts not flesh, but names. It hunts not animals, but stars. For every name has its star, and every star is a throne, and every throne is a covenant.
412. Thus says the Lord:
413. A man without his star is a body without a soul.
414. A nation without its star is a land without a covenant.
415. A people without their star are bones without memory.

416. But now the Hungwe has descended, carrying in its claws the star of Sydney 15550 — a star blazing in the heavens with the number 1841, the measure of ABASID, the Son of Thought, the Lion of Zion, the Scribe of Fire.
417. *THE STAR IS THE NAME*
418. Do you not know? Do you not understand? Every living soul, every child born of man or woman, carries both a name on earth and a star in heaven.

419. The name you bear is but a shadow, a passing sound on the tongues of men. But your true name — your ZITA — is etched into the sky as a star. When you live in truth, your star burns bright. When you walk in covenant, your star shines eternal. But when you reject the covenant, when you deny your origin, your star is dimmed, your name is erased from the heavens.

420. So it was with Bethlehem, when wise men saw a star and followed it, for the star was the name of IYESU, the Anointed One. So it was with Joseph in the Book of Jasher, when he revealed to Benjamin his star, his heavenly identity. So it is now with ABASID 1841, whose star is Sydney 15550, a red-blooded sign cut into the heavens before the foundations of the earth.
421. *THE COVENANT OF HUNGWE*
422. The Hungwe is no ordinary bird. It is the watcher of the skies. It is the hunter of names. It is the guardian of stars.

423. When the Hungwe flies, it does not search for prey; it searches for memory. When the Hungwe hunts, it does not catch flesh; it catches destiny. When the Hungwe cries, it is not a sound of hunger; it is a roar of judgment.
424. Thus says the Hungwe:
425. I hunt names.
426. I hunt stars.
427. I hunt thrones.
428. I hunt covenants.

429. Blessed are those who still carry their stars in the heavens, for the Hungwe shall crown them. Cursed are those who have lost their stars through lies and betrayal, for the Hungwe shall expose them.
430. *THE RED BLOODLINE*
431. Why Sydney 15550? Why the Hungwe? Why Zimbabwe?

432. Because the throne of Zion has always been in the South. Because the covenant of blood has always been in the veins of Zimbabwe. Because the star of ABASID 1841 is red, burning like blood, roaring like fire, sealing like truth.
433. This is the bloodline of the Hungwe, the line of those who rise not by politics, not by religion, not by lies, but by the eternal law of covenant. The Hungwe cries:
434. Zimbabwe, you are my firstborn!
435. Zimbabwe, your star is sealed in heaven!
436. Zimbabwe, your blood is written in fire!
437. *THE SPHINX RIDDLES*
438. The Hungwe is also the Sphinx. It does not reveal without riddle. It does not crown without question. It does not seal without trial.
439. Here are the Seven Riddles of Hungwe Sydney 15550, with their answers, sealed by thunder:
440. Riddle: What is seen every night yet never sleeps? *Answer* : Your star, your true name in heaven.
441. Riddle: What is hunted but never eaten, caught but never slain? *Answer* : Your destiny, pursued by the Hungwe.
442. Riddle: What dies on earth but rises eternal in the sky? *Answer* : The star of your name, your ZITA written in fire.
443. Riddle: What cannot be buried in soil, drowned in water, or silenced by death? *Answer* : The covenant of your star.
444. Riddle: What is both bird and star, both name and throne? *Answer* : The Hungwe itself, messenger of truth.
445. Riddle: What number thunders across heaven as a seal of kings? *Answer* : 1841, the star of ABASID, the Son of Zion.
446. Riddle: Who is both man and eagle, son and father, thought and word? *Answer* : ABASID 1841, Sydney 15550, the Hungwe in flesh.
447. *THE DECLARATION*

448. Thus says the Father: “I have given My Son a star, Sydney 15550, to be a sign in the heavens for this generation. As I gave Bethlehem a star two thousand years ago, so now I give Zimbabwe a star. As I sealed IYESU in heaven, so now I seal ABASID in the skies. The Hungwe has flown. The eagle has cried. The covenant has been sealed.”

449. Thus says the Son: “I am the star and the name. I am the throne and the covenant. Before you think of rejecting me, remember — you think because I will it. For I am Thought, I am Truth, I am Hungwe. I am ABASID 1841, the Sydney star, the red bloodline of Zimbabwe.”
450. Thus says the Spirit: “I crown the faithful. I thunder the covenant. I blaze the thrones. I roar the truth.”
451. *THE CALL*

452. Now, O nations, what shall you do? Shall you rise and board the covenant of Hungwe, or shall you remain in darkness? Shall you claim your star, your true name, your throne, or shall you be erased from memory? Shall you drink the covenant of fire, or shall you thirst in eternal silence?
453. This is no social soccer. This is no church league. This is no political season. This is the World Cup of Eternity. This is the crowning of nations. This is the enthronement of Zion.
454. ABASID 1841 has scored the first goal. The Hungwe has roared the first thunder. Sydney 15550 has shone the first fire.
455. The question is: Will you rise?

book_title: THE SEAL
verses: 1. THE SEAL
2. The Scroll of Hungwe Sydney 15550 is now sealed with fire. Its wings cover Zimbabwe. Its cry pierces the nations. Its star blazes in heaven.
3. This is eternal. This is thunder. This is truth. This is the red bloodline of Zimbabwe.
5. *By ANI 1841 — ABASID — The Hungwe Star*
6. ⚡ THE SCROLL OF THE CLOSED GATE – A THUNDEROUS WITNESS FROM ABASID 1841 ⚡
7. Hear, O nations, and give ear, O Zimbabwe, for today the Gate has shut, and the key has been sealed by the hand of the Lion.

8. Long did I call unto you with patience. Long did I stretch forth the hand of wisdom. Long did I cry in your marketplaces, in your churches, in your temples, saying, “Come aboard, for Flight 777 is ready, the Hungwe spreads her wings, and the path to Zion is open.”
9. But you mocked.
10. You pointed the finger and laughed. You called me strange, you called me lost, you called me false.
11. You lifted your voices not to sing with me, but to drown me with your noise.
12. You lifted your hands not to build with me, but to throw stones.
13. And so it is written: “They thrust a sword through My ribs, not with iron, but with the mocking of their lips and the ignorance of their hearts.”
14. You chose the State above the Spirit.
15. You chose money above wisdom.
16. You chose the fleeting shadow above the eternal light.
17. And I, ABASID 1841, have borne it in silence.
18. I gave freely. I asked not for coin, nor for wealth, nor for your treasures.
19. I opened the storehouses of heaven, and poured manna into your mouths without charge.
20. I gave you the keys of numbers, the hidden wisdom of stars, the path of eclipses, the calendar of your fathers, the forgotten names, the true covenant.
21. Yet you treated it as dust.
22. For it is in man’s nature not to value what is given freely.
23. When Yesu walked among them, He was despised, He was cheap, He was ignored.
24. But when He was sold, they rushed to buy Him with thirty pieces of silver.
25. So it is with me.
26. You looked at me and saw nothing. You listened, but you did not hear.
27. You mocked, and in your mocking, you pierced my side.
28. But now the Gate has closed.
29. Now the Hungwe has lifted her wings.
30. Now the Woman of Revelation has been taken into her place, for a time, times, and half a time — for the fullness of the Age of Aquarius, two thousand one hundred and sixty years.
31. She has gone where only I and the Father know, and none shall follow save those marked by the Star.
32. Blessed are those who entered when the door was open.
33. Blessed are those who said YES when the call was made.
34. For to them is salvation, and to them is memory restored.
35. But as for the rest, let him that does evil continue in his evil.
36. Let him that mocks continue mocking.
37. Let him that worships the State bow lower still.
38. Let him that loves money drink deeply of his cup.
39. For the Judge is set, and NGU will weigh all men.
40. Do not say, “We did not hear.”
41. Do not say, “We were not told.”
42. For I spoke in the open square.
43. I spoke by scroll, by sign, by vision, by number, by the rising and setting of the sun.
44. I placed the truth in your very tongue, in your very culture, in your very soil.
45. The Zimbabwe Bird stood before you, crying aloud that it is a messenger from Mwari, a bridge between heaven and earth.
46. But you were blind.
47. You saw stone, but not the Spirit.
48. You saw history, but not prophecy.
49. You saw a carving, but not the covenant.
50. And you mocked the messenger sent to reveal it.
51. Therefore I say unto you: the Gate is closed.
52. Flight 777 has departed.
53. The woman has fled into the wilderness, nourished by the Father.
54. And you? You remain.
55. You remain with your politics, your divisions, your drunken feasts, your false prophets, your Masowe lies.
56. You remain with your hollow churches that sell blessings for coin but hide truth for fear.
57. You remain with your governments that bleed the poor and fatten the rich.
58. You remain with your idols — your money, your houses, your cars, your power, your empty promises.
59. And when judgment falls, you will have no covering.
60. For you laughed at the Hungwe, and you mocked the Star.
61. Do you not know that every man has a Star, a Name written in heaven?
62. Do you not know that your Star is the bridge between your dust and your eternity?
63. Do you not know that when your body returns to the soil, your children should be able to lift their eyes and see you among the stars?
64. But you have lost your Stars.
65. You do not know your Names.
66. You do not know the covenant of your fathers.
67. You have been disqualified.
68. And when the Son of Thought came to reunite you with your Star, you rejected Him.
69. Now the Gate is closed.
70. And you will know shame.
71. For shame is the cloak of the mocker, and guilt is the crown of the disbeliever.
72. But as for the faithful few — you shall soar with the Hungwe.
73. You shall dwell in the hidden place of the Father.
74. You shall eat manna for the 2,160 years of the Age.
75. You shall drink living water, and your memory shall be restored.
76. For resurrection is not flesh rising from dust, but memory rising from silence.
77. And I, ABASID 1841, Son of Thought, Father of Thought, THOTH returned, shall give you back your true Names.
78. And your Names shall shine as Stars forever.

book_title: THE SPHINX RIDDLINGS FOR THE NATIONS
verses: 1. ⚡ THE SPHINX RIDDLINGS FOR THE NATIONS ⚡
2. Who gave you breath to think, if not Thought Himself?
3. If every man has a Star, why do you walk without knowing yours?
4. If the Hungwe perches on your flag, why do you not fear its message?
5. If the woman has fled for 2,160 years, what will you do in her absence?
6. If the Gate is shut, who shall open it for you?
7. If you mocked the messenger, what will you say when you stand before the Master?
8. If you rejected freely-given bread, will you buy it when famine falls?

book_title: AND SO THE SCROLL THUNDERS
verses: 1. And so the scroll thunders:
2. The age of begging is over.
3. The age of invitation is past.
4. The age of warning is complete.
5. Now remains only shame, only guilt, only the sword of NGU’s judgment.
6. But the faithful shall live.
7. For the Lion has roared, and the Hungwe has taken flight.
8. The Gate is shut.
9. The matter is sealed.
10. The scroll is written.
11. The throne has spoken.
12. ⚡ I AM ABASID 1841. I AM THOUGHT. I AM THE HUNGWE. I AM THE SON AND THE FATHER. THE GATE IS CLOSED. ⚡
13. 🔥 THE BOOK OF THE  TEN FIRES 🔥
14. By ANI – ABASID 1841*
15. *PROLOGUE*
16. In the beginning was FIRE, And FIRE was with GOD, And FIRE was GOD.
17. Out of the eternal flame came light, And out of light came form, And out of form came man.
18. Every soul that walks the earth carries a spark, Hidden in the heart, concealed in the bones, Waiting for the day when the Ten Fires shall call it back to remembrance.
19. The Ten Fires are not ten torches lit by men, But ten eternal flames kindled before the foundation of the world.
20. They burn in heaven, they burn in earth, they burn in the soul of every faithful one, And they shall never be quenched.
21. *THE TEN FIRES*
22. 🔥 The First Fire – The Fire of BIRTH. It speaks: “You are not an accident. You are breath of God made flesh.”
23. 🔥 The Second Fire – The Fire of MEMORY. It whispers: “Remember who you are. Forgetfulness is death.”
24. 🔥 The Third Fire – The Fire of STRUGGLE. It roars: “Every trial is flame forging your soul. Do not curse the furnace. Rejoice in its heat.”
25. 🔥 The Fourth Fire – The Fire of WISDOM. It says: “To know God is to walk in His fire, for wisdom is flame, and foolishness is ashes.”
26. 🔥 The Fifth Fire – The Fire of LOVE. It declares: “To give love is to live. To withhold love is to die.”
27. 🔥 The Sixth Fire – The Fire of JUSTICE. It thunders: “Truth cannot be hidden. Justice cannot be bribed. The Fire of the Throne burns all lies.”
28. 🔥 The Seventh Fire – The Fire of NATION. It proclaims: “Zimbabwe, you are chosen. Your soil is altar. Your people are flame. Rise, O land of the sun.”
29. 🔥 The Eighth Fire – The Fire of REMEMBRANCE. It warns: “The disqualified walk as dead. They eat, they rule, they speak, but they are ashes without memory. Only those who remember live.”
30. 🔥 The Ninth Fire – The Fire of VICTORY. It shouts: “Crucified but lives! Beheaded but never disqualified! ABASID 1841 carries the torch of eternity.”
31. 🔥 The Tenth Fire – The Fire of RETURN. It sings: “The Son has overcome. The Father has declared. The crown is given. The Game of Life is won.”
32. *DECLARATION OF THE FATHER*
33. Behold, My children, the Ten Fires are lit in you.
34. The faithful shall rise in flame and rule with My Son.
35. The disqualified shall stumble in smoke and wander until they learn.
36. But the Champion, My Son, ANI – ABASID 1841 – has overcome.
37. He has lit the Ten Fires again in the earth.
38. Follow him, and you too shall burn with eternal light.
39. 🔥 KUFUNGA NDINI. PASINA KUFUNGA – WAFAAAA. 🔥 🔥 HAMENo IKOKO. 🔥
40. *🌍⚡ THE BOOK OF THE KEY – BY ABASID 1841 ⚡🌍*

41. This is not a book. This is not a tale. This is not the ink of men. This is the BOOK OF THE KEY — the thunder carved in 1841 verses, a river of eternity unleashed. It was hidden, locked in heaven, until the appointed hour. Now the Key has appeared in the South, in the hands of ABASID 1841, the Rider of the Bow, the Crown of the Spiral Nation, the Lamb of Fire returned.

42. The Book of the Key is the scroll of judgment and reward, the covenant of lightning, the roar of Zambezi waters, the flame of Sinai unbroken. It is the Key promised in Revelation, the Key that unlocks the New Heaven and the New Earth. It is the scroll no man could open, sealed with thunder, guarded by lions. Now it is opened by the Father Himself, through the Son returned, ABASID 1841.
43. ⚡ It is thunder that shakes the mountains. ⚡ It is fire that melts the idols. ⚡ It is light that blinds the wicked. ⚡ It is a crown that clothes the meek.

44. The Key is not philosophy. The Key is not speculation. The Key is Factum Probanda — evidence in fire, truth in stone, judgment in eternity. The Book of the Key carries the weight of the 44 Gates, the memory of the Sun, the silence of the stars, and the roar of the Throne.

45. It is the river of justice: the righteous crowned, the humble exalted, the martyrs rewarded, the Bride glorified. It is the flood of judgment: the liar erased, the deceiver bound, the oppressor cast to dust, the beast undone. It is the eternal covenant: no night, no tears, no death, no end. The saints laugh forever, the martyrs sing forever, the prophets thunder forever, the Bride rejoices forever.
46. This is the scroll of life. This is the seal of eternity. This is the Key.
47. And so, to guard this Key, the Father has placed seven riddles of the Sphinx, hidden in the thunder, spoken here as fire:
48. *🔮 The Seven Riddles of the Sphinx*
49. Riddle One: What walks with no feet, speaks with no tongue, and yet drowns kings in silence? 🌊 The River of Truth.
50. Riddle Two: What burns with no flame, cuts with no blade, and yet crowns the meek in glory? 🌞 The Light of the Sun.
51. Riddle Three: What throne is built with no stone, yet holds the weight of all creation? 👑 The Heart of Man.
52. Riddle Four: What roars without voice, kills without hand, and yet saves by its silence? ⏳ The Judgment of Time.
53. Riddle Five: What temple has no walls, no roof, no door, yet cannot be destroyed? 🕊 The Living Body of God.
54. Riddle Six: What key opens every gate, yet is itself never locked? 📜 The Word made Flesh.
55. Riddle Seven: What question cannot be asked, what answer cannot be spoken, yet both thunder in eternity? 🔥 The Name of God.
56. These riddles guard the scroll, for only those who see may pass, and only those who pass may live.

57. The Book of the Key is now revealed, but its treasure belongs only to the faithful, the humble, the meek, the merciful, the pure, the Bride who has prepared herself. To the proud, it is thunder without light. To the deceiver, it is fire without warmth. To the beast, it is a sword without mercy.
58. *⚡ DECLARATION FROM THE FATHER*

59. “I, RA, the Father of Light, declare this scroll sealed in eternity. I declare that the BOOK OF THE KEY is written by ABASID 1841, the Lamb returned, the Rider of the South, the Crown of the New Covenant. I declare that no hand shall erase it, no beast shall bend it, no nation shall silence it. I declare that whoever believes in this Key shall walk in eternity, and whoever rejects it shall vanish in dust. I declare that the New Heaven and the New Earth are unlocked, that the tears are wiped, that death is undone. I declare that Zion is risen, the Bride is crowned, the martyrs are clothed, the prophets are honored, the saints are rejoicing. I declare that the Two Lions are on the Throne, roaring forever. I declare that God dwells with His people, and His people dwell with God. Forever and ever. Amen. Amen. Amen.”
60. 📜 *THE KEY OF A SA RA A  SCROLL*
61. *By ABASID 1841*
62. *PROLOGUE: THE MYSTERY OF THE KEY*

63. Hear, O heavens, and give ear, O earth. A mystery is revealed, and its name is thunder. For the Father has given unto the Son not a sword of iron, nor a sceptre of silver, but a Key of fire and eternity.

64. This Key is not forged in furnaces of men. It is born in the spiral of creation. It is carved from light, sealed by wind, anchored in the sun. Its letters are four, its number is one: A–SA–RA–A = 1841.
65. This is the Key of ASARAA, the hidden code of ages, the cipher of heaven, the password of eternity.
66. *THE KEY THAT TURNS*
67. When the Key of ASARAA turns, the locks of the nations tremble. When it turns eastward, it unlocks the wisdom of the ancients, and the gates of memory open.
68. When it turns westward, it seals the mouths of liars, and the thrones of false prophets collapse.
69. When it turns northward, it unlocks the wells of judgment, and rivers of fire descend upon the earth.
70. When it turns southward, it seals the gates of death, and none may pass but by the blood of the Lamb.
71. Thus the Key is alive. It unlocks and it locks. It binds and it looses. It opens and it shuts, and no man can reverse its decree.
72. *ZIMBABWE – THE DOOR OF THE KEY*
73. Behold Zimbabwe, land of stone and star. The world mocked you as poor, but heaven marked you as rich. For in your soil lies the throne of memory, and in your people burns the fire of the sun.
74. To you the Key of ASARAA has been given. To you the scroll is entrusted. For Zimbabwe is the door, and the Key turns only in this door.

75. Nations seek the Key in Rome, but Rome holds only broken chains. Nations seek the Key in Jerusalem, but Jerusalem holds only empty tombs. Nations seek the Key in Mecca, but Mecca holds only shadows of stone.
76. But Zimbabwe — you hold the true Lock, and the Key of ASARAA fits your gates.
77. *THE WORLD – THE GATES THAT OPEN*
78. When the Key turns in Zimbabwe, the gates of the world are shaken. The prison doors of Africa fly open. The chains of debt, corruption, and false religion shatter.
79. The East receives light. The West is humbled. The North is silenced. The South rises.
80. For the Key of ASARAA is not for Zimbabwe alone. It is the Key for all creation, but it begins in the stone that men rejected. It begins in the Lion’s den. It begins in the Spiral Nation.
81. *THE POWER OF THE KEY*
82. The Key does not bend. It does not rust. It does not break. It is eternal, unchanging, indestructible.

83. The Key silences governments. The Key humbles presidents. The Key overrules constitutions. The Key tears the seals of scrolls. The Key unlocks the gates of heaven. The Key locks the abyss of darkness.
84. The Key speaks in numbers: 1–8–4–1. The Key speaks in sounds: A–SA–RA–A. The Key speaks in fire: ☀️. The Key speaks in wind: 🌬️. The Key speaks in blood: 🔴.
85. *THE THRONE AND THE KEY*
86. Behold, ABASID 1841 sits upon the throne with the Key in His hand. The Hungwe hovers above Him. The Lion roars beside Him. The earth shakes beneath Him. The heavens bow before Him.
87. He places the Key upon the door of time. The lock turns. The seal breaks. The new age is born.
88. And He declares: “I am ASARAA, the Key. I am ABASID 1841, the Holder. I open and none can shut. I shut and none can open. This is the decree of the Throne.”
89. *THE LOCKS THAT ARE SEALED*
90. With the Key of ASARAA, the gates of greed are locked. The doors of corruption are sealed. The thrones of false prophets are shut. The temples of idols are barred.
91. With the Key of ASARAA, the mouths of mockers are silenced. The pens of liars are broken. The seats of scorners are dismantled. The scrolls of deceivers are burned.
92. With the Key of ASARAA, death is sealed, hell is sealed, darkness is sealed, and the kingdom of the Beast is sealed.
93. *THE LOCKS THAT ARE OPENED*
94. But with the same Key of ASARAA, the doors of memory are opened. The gates of wisdom are opened. The wells of healing are opened. The storehouses of truth are opened.
