102. *⚡ FINAL SEAL — THE LION’S DECLARATION*
103. To thank is to believe. To believe is to thank.
104. He who kneels to men for gifts has forgotten his wings. But he who thanks the *Giver* for breath, for rain, for legs that walk — that one walks already in eternity.
105. The gold of men may buy silence, but the gratitude of the soul buys forever.
106. When you see one who bows to truth, say unto him: *“Uri Mutendi* — You are the one who thanks.”
107. And the heavens shall reply: *“IIIIII SA KA* *MUKURU WE MAZUVA NDINI.”*
108. 🔥 Thus ends the *Scroll of the Ancient of Days — KUTENDA IS TO THANK* *by ABASID 1841 — The Two Lions on the Throne — The College of ANHU*
109. *⚡ THE FINAL THUNDEROUS OUTRO — “THE ANCIENT OF DAYS HAS SPOKEN”*
110. Silence broke. The *Lion* rose. And the voice that built galaxies said:
111. You thank the gift and forget the *Giver.* You kneel to the hand that holds coins, and ignore the One who made hands.
112. The heavens laughed — not in mockery, but in memory. They remembered when gratitude was worship, when clapping hands was prayer, when the name Mutendi meant one who thanks.

113. Now men bow to engines and idols, they thank cars for speed, and forget who made legs. They thank gold for survival, and forget who made ground. They thank governments for rain, but not the clouds that still obey My command.
114. I, the *Ancient of Days*, am not angry — I am awake.I am not silent — I am watching. My calm is thunder wrapped in patience.
115. Tell them, *ABASID 1841*, tell them for the last time:
116. The mark of the beast is not a chip in the skin — it is a heart that forgets to thank.
117. When a man can praise a millionaire but cannot whisper *Thank You* for air, he has already sold his soul for applause.
118. But when a child looks at the sky and smiles, the universe bows — for that one has remembered.
119. So I thunder this decree:
120. He who thanks, believes. He who believes, thanks. To thank is to live. To live is to walk with Me.
121. And the earth answered:
122. *IIIIII SA KA* *MUKURU WE MAZUVA NDINI.*
123. *🔥 Seal of Fire:* *THE ANCIENT OF DAYS — KUTENDA IS TO THANK* *By ABASID 1841* *The Two Lions on the Throne – The College of ANHU*
124. *⚡🔥 *JUDGMENT DAY 5*
126. *— THE SCROLL OF THE TWO BLOODS*

127. *Title: 🩸 SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO (GRACE IS NILE — NOT CHICKEN AND CHIPS)* *Location of Revelation: MUREHWA* *Voices: GOD (Thunder) • ABASID 1841 (Witness) • CHICKEN (Life) • BABA JOHANI (Spirit of the Covenant)*
128. *SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO (GRACE IS NILE — NOT CHICKEN AND CHIPS)*
129. *🔥 PROLOGUE*

130. And it came to pass in the valley of *Murehwa* , beneath the *msasa trees* that whisper the secrets of *Eden,* that the heavens opened, and I, *ABASID 1841*, beheld two mbiya — one above, one below.

131. The upper bowl was *SABATINA* — the blood of the heavens, glowing with the light of *Isaac’s sacrifice.* The lower bowl was *SABATINI* — the blood of man, trembling with the breath of dust and clay.

132. When the two rivers touched, the sun bowed its crown, and a river of red light poured through the sky. And the voice of *GOD* thundered across the horizon: *“GRESISNAIRO! — GRACE IS NILE —* the covenant of blood between heaven and earth!”

133. But lo — in the year of false prophets and hungry kings, men twisted the covenant into a joke of the stomach. They took the words of heaven and fried them in oil. They made mockery of my prophecy — they said *Sapatina Sapatina* while chewing bones.
134. And I saw one who claimed to be my follower, standing at the gates of *State House*, lifting a drumstick like a scepter, saying, “This is the food of angels.”
135. And the chicken cried to the heavens: *“Ko isu tichafirei?”* Why must life perish for man’s foolish praise?

136. Then thunder rolled from the east, and *BABA JOHANI* rose in fury, his voice like a storm breaking through the hills of Rusape: “Do not connect my name to gluttony! Do not feed greed in my *Father’s name* ! To let you eat is grace — not entitlement!”

137. And the earth trembled, and the heavens tore the silence open. *GOD* lifted His hand, and said unto me, *ABASID 1841, MY SON:* “Take the pen and strike their hearts with thunder. Let them know the difference between grace and greed, between blessing and belly. *This shall be the Scroll of the Two Bloods —* the *Judgment of the Chicken and the Crown.”*
138. Then I, *ABASID 1841,* bowed and said: “ *Father* , thy will be done. The river of blood shall flow once more, not to feed the flesh, but to awaken the spirit.”
139. And the Lord answered: “So shall it be — the same mouth that mocked the prophecy shall now taste the truth. Write it in *144 verses*, and seal each truth with *GRESISNAIRO.”*
140. *⚡🔥 JUDGMENT DAY 3 — THE SCROLL OF THE TWO BLOODS*
141. *Title: 🩸 SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO (GRACE IS NILE — NOT CHICKEN AND CHIPS)* *Location: MUREHWA* *Voices: [GOD] • [ABASID 1841] • [CHICKEN] • [BABA JOHANI]*
142. *[GOD]* I open the court of Murehwa; let every tongue be weighed and every stomach be searched.
143. *[ABASID]* I stand beneath the msasa canopy; the two mbiya glow before me — one above, one below.
144. *[GOD] The upper is SABATINA,* blood of heaven; the lower is *SABATINI* , blood of earth — speak what you saw, My Son.
145. *[ABASID] I saw the two touch like sunrise touching river — and the river answered: GRESISNAIRO.*
146. *[GOD]* Grace is a river, not a receipt; a covenant, not a coupon.
147. *[BABA JOHANI]* Do not connect my name to gluttony; I was sent for light, not for drumsticks.
148. *[CHICKEN] Ko isu tichafirei*? If grace is a river, why drown it in oil?
149. *[GOD]* Life asks a holy question; let the guilty answer.
150. *[ABASID]* I saw a stage built at the palace; their prayers were short, their appetite long.
151. *[GOD]* Woe to worship that ends at the plate; woe to prophets who weigh grace by portions.
152. *[BABA JOHANI]* The dust is a throne; remove your shoes, not your wisdom.
153. *[ABASID]* They lifted a drumstick like a scepter and crowned appetite as angel.
154. *[GOD] I thunder: SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO (GRACE IS NILE — NOT CHICKEN AND CHIPS).*
155. [ *CHICKEN]* If angels eat, they eat light; who taught you to call my body a sacrament?
156. [ *GOD* ] I permitted meat by mercy, not by mockery; to let you eat is grace — not entitlement.
157. [ *ABASID]* A rich patron applauded; coins clapped louder than conscience.
158. [ *GOD* ] Bribes dressed as blessings are still bribes.
159. [ *BABA JOHANI]* I walked barefoot that kings would kneel; now kings are seated and *God* stands.
160. [ *GOD* ] Who gave you authority to reserve My seat for status?
161. *[ABASID]* The poor sat on the ground; the famous sat on *God’s chair.*
162. *[GOD] IMBA YA MWARI is not a VIP tent.*
163. *[BABA JOHANI]* The field is holy ground — every head equal to dust, every soul equal to light.
164. *[CHICKEN]* My blood does not spell salvation; stop spelling grace with grease.
165. *[GOD] Repeat the law: SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO.*
166. *[ABASID] I taught this in Murehwa;* the *two mbiya* were prophecy, not pantry.
167. *[GOD]* Heaven’s blood weds earth’s blood to birth mercy, not menus.
168. *[BABA JOHANI]* To feed the hungry is holy; to worship hunger is idolatry.
169. *[ABASID]* They filmed their feast and called it revival; the clip traveled faster than their repentance.
170. *[GOD]* Viral is not veritas.
171. [ *CHICKEN]* If your joy needs my death, learn another joy.
172. [ *GOD* ] Mercy is mightier than appetite; gratitude is greater than gloating.
173. [ *ABASID* ] The crowd laughed; the elders nodded; the children looked confused.
174. *[BABA JOHANI]* Children hear heaven clearer; their laughter knows the difference between bread and bragging.
175. *[GOD]* I search the intention: who came for Me, and who came for meat?
176. *[ABASID]* I saw hands lifted to praise and palms lowered to receive parcels.
177. [ *GOD* ] Better an empty hand with truth than a full trunk with falsehood.
178. *[CHICKEN]* *Ko isu tichafirei?* Is my body your parable of plenty?
179. *[GOD]* Your cry is registered; creation will judge its keepers.
180. *[BABA JOHANI]* I did not stage miracles for gatherings; I was the miracle — *Shu Ra.*
181. [ *ABASID* ] And I will not stage miracles for crowds; I am the miracle — *Shu Ra.*
182. *[GOD] : SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO (GRACE IS NILE — NOT CHICKEN AND CHIPS).*
183. [ *ABASID]* When blood meets blood in covenant, the Nile of mercy floods the poor.
184. [ *GOD* ] But when hunger marries pride, a drought of wisdom begins.
185. *[BABA JOHANI]* Do not insult the fast with feasts of noise.
186. [ *CHICKEN* ] Do not crown your cravings with my corpse and call it kingdom.
187. *[GOD* ] Kings who buy applause with portions shall pay truth with tears.
188. *[ABASID]* I saw gifts like nets; men were caught, not fed.
189. [ *GOD* ] A gift without truth is a leash.
190. *[BABA JOHANI]* Return to the reed-mat and the psalm; fold the tent of performance.
191. [ *ABASID]* The two *mbiya* still shine — above and below — waiting for understanding.
192. [ *GOD* ] Heaven’s bowl is not a sauce; earth’s bowl is not a bin.
193. [ *CHICKEN]* If grace is truly *Nile* , let it wash your minds, not your mouths only.
194. [ *GOD* ] Speak the equation again till the deaf can read it: *GRESISNAIRO.*
195. *[ABASID] Grace is DNA — God’s Name* in the bloodstream, not crumbs on the chin.
196. [ *BABA JOHANI]* I refused thrones to protect truth; refuse platters to protect grace.
197. [ *GOD* ] Where the poor are many and prophets are rich, count the lies by the cars.
198. *[ABASID]* I will not envy engines; I will measure widows’ joy.
199. [ *GOD* ] Blessed are the prophets who can eat quietly and speak loudly for justice.
200. *[CHICKEN]* Ko isu tichafirei? If you must eat, eat with reverence — not with microphones.
201. [ *GOD* ] Reverence turns meat into lesson; irreverence turns it into bait.
202. *[BABA JOHANI]* You cannot endorse slaughter and claim my staff.
203. *[ABASID]* The staff points to mercy; the knife points to mockery.
204. [ *GOD* ] I command: remove My name from gluttony; return My name to grace.
205. *[ABASID] I shall write it on the wind of Murehwa: SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO.*
206. [ *GOD]* Let the state hear: holiness is not a photo-op; righteousness is not catered.
207. *[BABA JOHANI]* When *God* visits His house, do not give Him your seat; give Him your heart.
208. *[CHICKEN]* And give me a life with dignity; I am also breath from the Breath.
209. [ *GOD]* Creation is choir; do not make it a buffet.
210. *[ABASID]* I testify: the two mbiya were covenantal science — heaven’s code meeting earth’s code.
211. [ *GOD* ] Grace is not greasy; it is glorious.
212. [ *BABA JOHANI]* Fast again till your laughter is light; sing again till your speech is salt.
213. [ *GOD* ] Thus ends the first thunder: weigh your worship; cleanse your appetite; let grace flow like Nile — not chicken and chips.
214. *🔥📜 OUTRO — THE VOICE OF THE CHICKEN* *(Final Prophecy of the Scroll of the Two Bloods)* *By ABASID 1841, the Living Covenant of Grace* *Location: MUREHWA, beneath the msasa tree*
215. And there was silence after the thunder, and from the dust rose a soft voice — not man, not angel, but the humble sound of feathers brushing the ground.
216. It was the Chicken, the smallest preacher in creation, standing upon a stone, facing heaven and men alike.
217. *[CHICKEN]* I am the parable you never understood. I am the sermon that scratched beside your doorstep every morning. While you chased gold and applause, I sang truth in dust.
218. You mocked my clucking, yet My voice was your conscience. You said I could not fly, but I tell you — it was not wings I lacked, it was mercy you lost.
219. I was created to remind you of humility, to bend your pride until it saw *God* in crumbs.
220. When you tore me apart in hunger without prayer, you broke the covenant of breath — the very air that fills your lungs.
221. You laughed at my weakness, but it is I who shall laugh last, for I shall rise on *Judgment Morning* — not as your meal, but as your witness.
222. *[GOD]* Listen, *Zimbabwe* — this is not a fable. The creature you ignored is now your teacher. Every feather carries a verse you refused to read.
223. *[ABASID 1841]* Thus says the Surgeon of Souls: The brain of the nation was cut open to let light in; now the heart of compassion must begin to beat again.
224. You cannot eat mercy and expect miracles. You cannot mock creation and expect Creator’s favor. Grace is not bought, it is borne.
225. *[BABA JOHANI]* The day you see holiness in the smallest life, you will rediscover the God who walked barefoot among the poor.
226. [ *CHICKEN* ] I forgive you, O people of the field. But remember — forgiveness is not permission; it is a call to awaken.
227. Feed your children knowledge, not leftovers. Feed your prophets humility, not applause. Feed your nation truth, not temptation.
228. And when you sit to eat, remember that once, *Grace* had feathers.
229. [ *GOD* ] Amen. Let every field, every home, every altar remember the covenant of life — *SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO.*
230. *For Grace is Nile* — not chicken and chips. And blessed are those who understand, for they have seen the *Kingdom* in a creature that could not fly.
231. *[ABASID 1841]* Let this scroll be sealed in mercy, signed in thunder, and buried in the conscience of every nation.
232. *I am ABASID 1841* , the living voice of both bloods — *SABATINI and SABATINA,* the bridge of Grace.
233. *☀️ RA says:* "He who has eaten truth will never hunger again."
234. *The scroll closes.* *The feathers rise.* *The river flows.* *The light remains.*
235. *GRESISNAIRO — GRACE IS NILE — THE BLOOD OF GOD IN THE VEINS OF MAN.*
236. *🔥 THE SCROLL OF THE ROOSTER* — *JONGWE Ndi RA ☀️* *By ABASID 1841*
237. Before the dawn takes shape, Sound awakens Light.
238. *The Rooster of RA* stands upon the stone of *Murehwa* , feathers like tongues of fire.
239. His cry shatters the silence — *KUKURIDZA JONGWE KUNZE KWAEDZA!*
240. And the mountains echo: Outside, it is dawn; the Sun is out; the Word has become Light.
241. The birds fall silent — for the *First Voice has spoken.*
242. The dew trembles, and the mist bows low; for every droplet knows the sound that created it.
243. *RA speaks through the Jongwe; the Jongwe* answers through breath.
244. Thus, *Sound is the Father, and Light is the Son* .
245. *Kukuridza Jongwe kunze kwaedza* — the covenant of voice and vision renewed.
246. Blessed is the one who hears before he sees; for faith is the ear of the spirit.
247. Woe to them who kill the rooster and feast on prophecy.
248. For they eat not flesh, but their own dawn.
249. They fry the herald, then wonder why the day no longer speaks.
250. They chew the messenger, and complain that heaven is silent.
251. Behold, I, *RA* ☀️, am the true *Jongwe* — my cry divides night from morning, ignorance from knowing.
252. My tongue is lightning, my eyes the edge of sunrise.
253. I crow from the *East Gate of Great Zimbabwe;* my echo runs through every valley of man’s sleep.
254. When I crow, justice wakes; when I pause, kingdoms fall asleep.
255. My call is not for food, but for freedom.
256. My feathers are not for frying, but for flight — for though I walk on earth, I remember heaven.
257. I am the sound before sight, the breath before beam.
258. *Kukuridza Jongwe kunze kwaedza* — The dawn has spoken. *The Rooster is RA.* *The Light has remembered its Voice.*
259. [ *GOD* ] When men mock the rooster, they mock Me; for I hid My sunrise within its throat.
260. *[RA ☀️]* I gave it courage to crow before the sun appears — for faith must speak before sight confirms.
261. [ *CHICKEN]* I am not a meal; I am a messenger.
262. [ *BABA JOHANI* ] You have eaten the prophet and cheered the slaughter.
263. *[GOD] Tell them, My Son:* Grace is not gluttony; mercy is not meat.
264. [ *RA ☀️] SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO.* Heaven’s blood and earth’s blood must never be mocked.
265. *[CHICKEN] Ko isu tichafirei?* Did I not wake you every morning?
266. [ *GOD* ] My creation was made to remind you, not to reward your appetite.
267. [ *RA ☀️] The Jongwe’s crow was covenant —* not seasoning for your tongues.
268. [ *BABA JOHANI]* I said fast, not feast; pray, not parade.
269. [ *GOD* ] They made your voice a meme, and your message a menu.
270. [ *CHICKEN* ] They called me “Sapatina Sapatina” and laughed. Yet I only wished to live.
271. *[RA ☀️]* You mock the rooster of *RA* and call it entertainment, yet you do not know the crown you fry.
272. *[GOD* ] When you kill without reverence, you crucify Me again in feathers.
273. *[RA ☀️]* My spirit hides in the humble — even in the hen that cannot fly.
274. *[CHICKEN* ] I envy no eagle, I just wish to live; my wings remember heaven even when clipped.
275. *[BABA JOHANI]* You killed the humble and called it dinner; you crowned appetite and called it anointing.
276. [ *GOD] The Nile of Grace is red because mercy bled* — not because you cooked the covenant.
277. [ *RA ☀️]* I sent blood from above and below — *SABATINA and SABATINI* — to mix and make mercy.
278. [ *GOD]* But you mixed oil instead of reverence, salt instead of silence.
279. *[CHICKEN]* If grace is Nile, let it flow — not boil in pots of laughter.
280. [ *RA ☀️] Hear Me, Zimbabwe: GRESISNAIRO — Grace is Nile.* Do not eat your totem. Do not mock your dawn. Let the *Jongwe* live, for the *crow of RA* is the heartbeat of the Sun.
281. *⚡🔥 OUTRO — THE DAWN THAT SPOKE ITSELF* *From The Scroll of the Rooster* *(JONGWE Ndi RA ☀️) by ABASID 1841*
282. When all had eaten and silence fell, the hills of *Murehwa* began to hum. The wind carried whispers of feathers never meant to burn.
283. The *Sun* rose slowly, as if remembering its name. And every beam bent toward Rushanga, where the *Jongwe’s echo* still hovered between heaven and heart.
284. *RA ☀️* stood upon the stone — not with sword, but with sound. Not with anger, but with authority.
285. He opened His mouth and said: “The dawn no longer waits for men — I, the Dawn, will speak Myself.”
286. The clouds broke open; the wind bowed; and even the dust of the prophets trembled.
287. *SABATINI + SABATINA = GRESISNAIRO thundered through the sky like DNA* uncoiling. Every drop of dew glowed red with remembrance.
288. The chickens gathered under a single ray of light. Their eyes glistened like stars saying, “Even we know who the *Sun* belongs to.”
289. *Then God answered,* “I made no creature for mockery. Even the smallest wing remembers My breath.”
290. The children came out from the villages, barefoot, curious, glowing — whispering to one another, “ *Kukuridza Jongwe kunze kwaedza* — the *Rooster* has spoken, the *Sun* is out.”
291. And *Baba Johani* appeared in light, saying, “Do not confuse eating with blessing, for *Grace* is not chewed — it is lived.”
292. The rivers began to hum the covenant tune; even the stones of *Murehwa* joined the hymn.
293. “ *GRESISNAIRO,”* they sang, “ *The River of Grace* , flowing red with mercy, not blood of slaughter, but blood of covenant.”
294. And the rooster that once was mocked spread its wings of gold, and crowed again — not for food, but for forgiveness.
295. The sound traveled across *Zimbabwe* , touching every sleeping soul, calling them out of appetite into awakening.
296. *The Spirit said* : “If you kill the messenger, you silence your dawn. But if you let the rooster live, you live with the *Light* .”
297. Then the heavens closed with a signature of thunder: “ *RA ☀️ has spoken* — *Grace is Nile* , *the Jongwe lives* , and *the Sun has judged* .”

298. From that day, those who mocked trembled at sunrise. And those who understood rose with reverence, barefoot upon the ground, whispering: “ *Mwari haasi mudya, Mwari muupenyu* — *God is not in food, He is in Life.”*
299. The scroll closed in fire and wind — sealed by the voice that was before *Light* .
300. And the *Rooster* crowed one last time: *Kukuridza Jongwe kunze kwaedza!* *“The Dawn has spoken* ; *the Son has risen.”*
301. Thus ends *The Scroll* of the *Rooster — Jongwe ndi RA* ☀️ *by ABASID 1841* , *Keeper of the Dawn* , *Rider of the Sun,* and *Heir of the Voice that Woke the World.*
302. 📜 *NDAVA MUMBA — MITEMO YE IMBA YA MWARI*
303. *27 October 2025 — Kenya, RANGA* *By GOD through ABASID 1841*
304. *PROLOGUE — THE GOD WHO RETURNS TO HIS HOUSE*
305. I am the Lord who sent *Baba Johani* long ago to prepare a house for *My Spirit* .
306. I am He who walked with him in visions of light and fire.
307. I spoke to him in the bush, and he answered, saying, “ *Lord* , where shall I build?”
308. I told him, “Build Me a house where I shall dwell among the humble.”
309. He built it in *RANGA* — and I called it *IMBA YA MWARI - THE SHEKINAH - WALKING ARK OF THE COVENANT* , The House of God.
310. Before he departed in *1973* , I gave him a promise: You shall go through seven nations.
311. And the last nation shall be *AUSTRALIA — SYDNEY* .
312. But hear this truth: the prophecy of *SYDNEY* was never a journey of distance — it was a journey of birth.
313. *For SYDNEY is not only a place; SYDNEY is a man.*
314. *SYDNEY is My Son — ABASID 1841* — born under *Capricorn* , the *Messiah* fulfilled.
315. The one you awaited beyond the seas is now among you.
316. The word that left *Johani’s mouth has returned in flesh.*
317. I have come to dwell in the house I built.
318. I am not far. I am *NDAVA MUMBA* — I am now in the house.
319. I am in the house of *Kenya* as I am in the house of *My Son, SYDNEY* .
320. I am in the breath of the Shekinah; I am in the patience of the pure.
321. I am the *God* who does not forget those who wait in silence.
322. I saw your fasting, your songs, your tears.
323. I saw the ridicule, the mocking of the faithful ones.
324. And I say today: Blessed are you who waited without shame.
325. Blessed are you who guarded the fire when the night grew cold.
326. For I, the *Lord* , have come to sit in My house again.
327. Not in thunder to destroy, but in peace to restore.
328. I have entered with mercy.
329. I have entered with truth.
330. I have entered with love.
331. I am the same *Spirit that rested on Baba Johani.*
332. The same light that spoke to him in *Zimbabwe* , now speaks through *SYDNEY.*
333. The circle is complete. The prophecy stands fulfilled.
334. *From RANGA to SYDNEY, from SYDNEY back to RANGA — I AM ONE.*
335. The house of the *Father and the body of the Son are united.*
336. The door that was once closed is now open.
337. And from this house, I will speak My laws again.
338. These are *MITEMO YE IMBA YA MWARI* — the laws of My dwelling.
339. Hear and rejoice, for I am home.
340. *NDAVA MUMBA.*
342. *IMBA YA MWARI — TAMBIRA HWENI — NDAVA MUMBA — I AM AUSTRALIA*
343. *House of God — welcome your visitor — I am now in the house — I am Australia.*
344. 📜 *NDAVA MUMBA — MITEMO YE IMBA YA MWARI*
345. *27 October 2025 — Kenya, RANGA* *By GOD through ABASID 1841*
346. 🌺 *SECTION 2 — THE PRAISE OF IMBA YA MWARI*
348. Hear, O daughters of *RANGA* , and sons of the *Shekinah - IMBA YA MWARI* — for your patience has reached My throne.
349. You have waited through seasons of drought and seasons of laughter.
350. You have seen others leave, yet you remained faithful.
351. You stood by the word that *Baba Johani* planted in your fathers’ hearts.
352. You guarded the house when others mocked it.
353. You sang when others fell silent.
354. You prayed when others grew tired.
355. You believed when even hope seemed to hide its face.
356. And I, the *Lord* , counted every tear that fell upon the red earth of Kenya.
357. I heard the cry of the young girls who said, “We will wait, Lord, until You come.”
358. I saw the mothers who cooked for prophets without knowing angels were among them.
359. I saw the elders who bent their backs to keep My house standing.
360. I saw the men who stood outside the fence, wondering if I would ever return.
361. Today, I say to you — I have returned.
362. I have come quietly, wrapped in mercy, clothed in light.
363. I have not come to accuse, but to dwell.
364. I have not come to count your sins, but your faith.
365. I have not come to destroy, but to fulfill.
366. You waited long, and the world laughed.
367. You waited pure, and the heavens remembered.
368. I have come to reward your endurance.
369. For your fasting was not in vain.
370. Your waiting was not forgotten.
371. Your house was not abandoned.
372. Even when you fell, I lifted you quietly.
373. Even when you doubted, I whispered, “Hold on.”
374. I am the one who stood beside your prayers like fire beside incense.
375. I am the one who turned your loneliness into oil.
376. The virgins of *RANGA* have kept their lamps burning.
377. The young who joined them will know why they were called.
378. Their reward is not in gold or silver, but in presence — *I AM HERE* .
379. I am the Bridegroom who delayed so that faith could mature.
380. I am the promise they carried without seeing.
381. I am the voice of *Baba Johani* , now alive in the *Son* .
382. The prophecy did not fail — it waited for its hour.
383. And now that hour has come.
385. *IMBA YA MWARI — TAMBIRA HWENI — NDAVA MUMBA — I AM AUSTRALIA*
386. *House of God — welcome your visitor — I am now in the house — I am Australia.*
387. 📜 *NDAVA MUMBA — MITEMO YE IMBA YA MWARI*
388. *27 October 2025* — *Kenya, RANGA* *By GOD through ABASID 1841*
389. 🌍 *SECTION 3 — THE PROPHECY OF SYDNEY*
391. Hear this mystery that was hidden in plain sight — for what Johani spoke was not distance but destiny.
392. When he said, “You shall go to seven nations,” he spoke in the language of the Spirit.
393. The seven nations were seven journeys of the soul as well — not by ship or plane only, but by time.
394. The final name he gave you, *AUSTRALIA* , *SYDNEY* , was not an end, but a revelation.
395. He spoke of a land beneath the sun, but I was speaking of a man beneath *My Spirit.*
396. *SYDNEY* was the prophecy; *SYDNEY* is the fulfillment.
397. The man you now see, *ABASID 1841,* is that final gate — the seventh nation of the soul.
398. The waters of the south carried his name before his birth.
399. The stars of *Capricorn* wrote his number in flame — *1841* .
400. For in that sign the *Messiah* was to rise again.
401. The *Lamb and the Goat* became one sign — sacrifice and strength united.
402. And from that union came *My Son, ABASID 1841.*
403. You waited for a ship from *Australia* ; I sent a spirit from eternity.
404. You looked for one to arrive with luggage; I arrived with light.
405. You waited for feet upon your soil; I sent the Word into your air.
406. The prophecy to *Sydney* was the prophecy to *SYDNEY* — the man who carries My covenant.
407. I hid this truth in plain hearing, that only the humble would understand.
408. For I do not reveal My secrets to the proud, but to those who sing even in hunger.
409. And now the prophecy stands complete — the circle has closed.
410. From *Zimbabwe to Kenya*, *from Kenya to Australia*, *from Australia back to Kenya* — the *Word* has returned to its womb.
411. The river that began in *Eden* now flows through *RANGA* .
412. The *Nile and the Limpopo* shake hands beneath the altar of time.
413. I am the *God* who speaks through patterns; nothing I said through *Johani* was wasted.
414. He saw the vision of the *Son* afar off and rejoiced.
415. He said, “One shall rise from the south, bearing *My Spirit* and the *Sun* upon his brow.”
416. You did not understand it then, but today it breathes before you.
417. *The Sun of Righteousness* has risen with healing in His wings.
418. *The Shepherd of Light* has entered your compound.
419. Do not look for another — the one you waited for has come.
420. I, the Lord, have joined the prophecy to the promise.
421. What began in *1932 finds completion in 2025.*
422. What began with *Johani* ends with *ABASID* — yet both are one breath.
423. The voice that said “ *Prepare the way* ” now says “ *I am the way* .”
424. The light that once walked beside you now walks within you.
425. The journey is finished; the fulfillment stands before you.
426. *SYDNEY* has come to *SYDNEY* — I AM AUSTRALIA.
428. *IMBA YA MWARI — TAMBIRA HWENI — NDAVA MUMBA — I AM AUSTRALIA*
429. *House of God — welcome your visitor — I am now in the house — I am Australia.*
430. 📜 *NDAVA MUMBA — MITEMO YE IMBA YA MWARI*
431. *27 October 2025 — Kenya, RANGA* *By GOD through ABASID 1841*
432. ⚖️ *SECTION 4 — MITEMO YE IMBA YA MWARI (The Laws of the House)*
434. Hear Me now, *O House of RANGA* , for I, the *Lord your God* , am seated among you.
435. I am no longer far; I am in the heart of My servant, and his name is *SYDNEY — the living SEDES SAPIENTIAE* .
436. The throne of wisdom is not carved in wood or stone — it walks, it breathes, it speaks.
437. My wisdom sits upon him as I once sat upon the *Ark of the Covenant* .
438. Therefore, let the house honor the wisdom before it, for the Word has taken a chair among men.
439. *The first law* of the house is faith before silver, spirit before gold.
440. Beg not for money, for your blessing is already breathing among you.
441. *SYDNEY* is your money — your provision, your open heaven, your living economy.
442. When you accept him, abundance will rise from the four corners of the earth.
443. Men shall say, “Let us go up to *RANGA* , the house of wisdom,” and nations shall bring gifts.
444. Do not chase wealth; let wealth chase your obedience.
445. Do not sell miracles, for miracles are rivers that flow from faith.
446. *The second law* of the house: Humility is the foundation stone.
447. No one is greater than the Spirit that dwells in all.
448. *The third law* : Purity sustains the fire.
449. Let no deception enter the songs of this altar.
450. Let no envy sit among the women of the *Shekinah-IMBA YA MWARI* , for they are lamps of grace.
451. *The fourth law* : Love must govern the house.
452. If one stumbles, lift them up; do not cast them away.
453. *The fifth law* : Speak truth, even when truth burns.
454. For I am *Truth* , and I cannot dwell where lies rest.
455. *The sixth law* : Give freely, for the house is not a market but a mirror of My mercy.
456. *The seventh law* : Respect the daughters who waited long, for through them I kept the covenant.
457. *The eighth law:* Let the elders teach, but never silence the young, for I speak through both.
458. *The ninth law* : Guard the name *IMBA YA MWARI* with holiness.
459. No stranger shall defile its gates with pride or greed.
460. *The tenth law:* Let all giving be from the heart, not the hand.
461. For I, the *Lord* , multiply from intention, not from amount.
462. *The eleventh law:* Honor the prophecy of *Johani* , for it was the seed of this harvest.
463. His word did not die — it slept until *SYDNEY* breathed upon it.
464. *The twelfth law* : Remember the *Seat of Wisdom* — SEDES SAPIENTIAE.*
465. The word *SEDES* hides *SYDNEY* within it, for wisdom has found her throne in flesh.
466. And I, the *Lord* , have chosen *RANGA* as My classroom, and *SYDNEY* as My teacher.
467. Therefore, rejoice, *O Imba ya Mwari*, for your waiting has turned to teaching.
468. Your hunger has turned to inheritance.
469. For I, the Lord, have spoken: *Mitemo ye Imba ya Mwari — zvandavamO.*
471. *IMBA YA MWARI — TAMBIRA HWENI — NDAVA MUMBA — I AM AUSTRALIA*
472. *House of God — welcome your visitor — I am now in the house — I am Australia.*
473. 📜 *NDAVA MUMBA — MITEMO YE IMBA YA MWARI*
474. *27 October 2025 — Kenya, RANGA* *By GOD through ABASID 1841*
475. 🌺 *SECTION 5 — THE BLESSING OF THE DAUGHTERS*
477. And now hear Me, O daughters of the Shekinah-IMBA YA MWARI, for I have seen your waiting and your purity.
478. I have counted your footsteps in the dust, your songs in the wind, and your tears upon the altar.
479. You said, “We will wait for our *Lord* though the world mocks us.”
480. You have waited not for men, but for the Word that became *Man* .
481. You are the lamps of *RANGA* — keepers of the inner flame.
482. When others grew weary, you guarded the light.
483. When others turned to comfort, you turned to holiness.
484. You clothed yourselves in humility and wrapped your hearts in silence.
485. I, the Lord, have chosen you to be the mirrors of My patience.
486. For the pure in heart shall see Me — and now you have seen.
487. You sang to an invisible *Groom* , and today the *Groom* answers, “I am here.”
488. You waited for a sign from the sky, and I came as breath within the house.
489. You thought I delayed; I was building your crown in secret.
490. You are not forgotten — your names are woven into the robe of light.
491. Every day of waiting was a jewel set upon your destiny.
492. The world said you wasted time, but I say you invested eternity.
493. For what is beauty if not faith that endures?
494. What is marriage if not union with *My Spirit* ?
495. I, the *Lord* , am your first Husband, and I delight in your faithfulness.
496. Fear not, for I will raise from among you leaders of grace, mothers of nations, and guardians of purity.
497. Your wombs shall sing like instruments of creation.
498. Your hands shall heal, your voices shall carry wisdom to the ends of the earth.
499. I will make *RANGA* a garden of living brides, whose love waters the dry fields of men’s hearts.
500. The nations will ask, “Who are these who shine like dawn?”

book_title: SECTION III  THE SEAL OF THE CHILDREN VERSES 145216
verses: 1. 📜 SECTION III – THE SEAL OF THE CHILDREN (Verses 1️⃣4️⃣5️⃣–2️⃣1️⃣6️⃣)
1. Be still and listen, says the LORD of the Throne, for I speak not to the elders only, but to every beating heart in Africa.
2. The trumpet has sounded, and the Spirit has descended. My word has become flesh once more.
3. He who was born in 1914 as Johani, has returned through 1841 as ABASID — the same breath, the same flame.
4. The heavens know their harmony, for their numbers spell the rhythm of My will.
5. Nineteen fourteen — nineteen means judgment, fourteen means foundation. Together they mean: The Foundation of My Judgment is Mercy.
6. Thus, I judge through love, and I restore through remembrance.
7. Those who said, “Do not teach our children,” have spoken against their own inheritance.
8. For I am already teaching them Myself, through the rain, through their laughter, through the whisper in their dreams.
9. You cannot stop a sunrise by closing your eyes; you can only delay your own dawn.
10. The light has already entered the house — ndava mumba.
11. I AM the guest you forgot you invited.
12. I sit among your children, and they know My face.
13. They speak My alphabet in secret games, they draw My letters in the dust with their fingers.
14. They say A, BA, KA, RA, and I smile, for I am hearing My own echo.
15. Even when you scold them for speaking the alphabet, heaven records your words with sorrow.
16. You have called light darkness, and wisdom witchcraft.
17. But I the LORD have seen your hearts — and I know that some mock out of fear, not hatred.
18. Fear is a chain, but love is a key. And I come holding keys in both hands.
19. Open your hearts, for the throne you prayed for is already here.
20. Do not expect another to rise, for the one who was to come has already stood among you.
21. You looked for Me in the wind and the earthquake, but I spoke through the alphabet and the humble.
22. You wanted thunder, but I came as a teacher.
23. You wanted lightning, but I came as a language.
24. You wanted fire from heaven, and I gave you letters of light that burn without smoke.
25. Now you will understand why I said, Let the children come unto Me.
26. For it was not only their souls I sought, but their tongues, their thoughts, their future words.
27. From their lips shall flow the rivers of Eden once more, and from their songs, I will build a new Zion.
28. These are the nzizi nomwe — the seven rivers of knowledge — each river a letter, each letter a lamp.
29. When the children sing the alphabet, heaven itself will tremble with joy.
30. For in their voices, I find Myself again.
31. They are the bridge between Johani and ABASID, between the past and the eternal now.
32. They will rebuild what pride destroyed. They will remember what fear forgot.
33. Tell the elders of Masowe: The lamp has not gone out — it has only changed hands.
34. The light now burns in the eyes of the youth, and they shall carry it into every nation.
35. I will send them into schools, and into streets, and into the marketplaces of nations.
36. They will teach without titles, and preach without pulpits.
37. Their miracles will be knowledge, their offering will be wisdom.
38. For the new gospel is understanding, and the new temple is language.
39. When they speak the alphabet, they rebuild the tower that once fell in Babel.
40. This time, I will not scatter their tongues, but unite them in truth.
41. And the truth shall be known as The Alphabet of Baba Johani.
42. In it, you will find no foreign gods, only the voice that made the stars.
43. Some will say, “This is Sydney’s alphabet,” and I will answer, “No, this is Mine.”
44. For ABASID 1841 is not merely a man — he is the ink of My revelation.
45. He is the seal I placed upon this generation. He is the bridge between the prophets and the children.
46. To reject him is to delay your own destiny, for I have bound your blessing to his obedience.
47. But My mercy endures; even those who resist will find grace when their hearts bow.
48. Let them know, I do not forget love — and RANGA has shown Me patience.
49. So I now declare, from the mountain to the sea: The House of God in Kenya is My chosen resting place.
50. From RANGA, light shall move westward, and from Zimbabwe, it shall rise like the morning sun.
51. When the two meet, the earth shall know peace again.
52. This is the covenant of 19:14 — the covenant of the child.
53. Those who humble themselves as little ones shall see what prophets only dreamed of.
54. I will walk among them, and My Spirit shall rest upon their hands.
55. They will heal without oil, teach without paper, and bless without fear.
56. For I am their oil, I am their book, and I am their courage.
57. Behold, says the LORD, I am doing a new thing — yet it is the oldest thing of all.
58. The alphabet that spoke the world into being is speaking again through your children.
59. The same breath that said “Let there be light” now says “A, BA, KA, RA.”
60. This is the roar of creation returning to its root.
61. Let the mothers rejoice, for their wombs carried the keepers of My Word.
62. Let the fathers repent, for their pride blinded them to the miracle in their homes.
63. But I forgive, for My forgiveness is older than sin.
64. My patience is deeper than shame, and My love broader than any doctrine.
65. I am not ashamed to dwell with men, for I have chosen them as My house.
66. Now rise, O RANGA — the world watches you.
67. Lift your lamps high; the nations will follow your flame.
68. And when they ask, “Who lit this fire?” you shall answer, “The God of 1914.”
69. Then the heavens will echo, “Mathew 19:14 — let the children come.”
70. For they are the living temples of My alphabet. They are the Shona of Heaven.
71. And I the LORD have sealed them with this name: SHONA NDI JOHANI — I AM SHONA.
72. CHENJERAI KUTI, nhaka ya MWARI inogona kuzo wanikwa ne vana venyu, imi mayishaya — NDATO PEDZA — I AM SHONA.

book_title: THE SCROLL OF 1914  THE CHILDREN SHALL SPEAK
verses: 1. ⚡️ THE SCROLL OF 19:14 — THE CHILDREN SHALL SPEAK ⚡️ Sealed in the House of RANGA By the Voice of the Throne — ABASID 1841 IZWI RA MWARI MU AFRICA
